string.text: Stash information
Rett's Stash
Rett stashed some loot.
Kruglov's Stash
Professor Kruglov said he hid a few artifacts.
Kruglov's Stash
Professor Kruglov said he hid a few artifacts.
Rett's Stash
Rett's PDA should be here.
Ammunition Stockpile
Mercenaries left some ammunition in Foggy Thicket.
Borov's Stash
Borov said there's something worth taking here...
Crate by the Cross
Some pal of Rasp's hid something useful here.
Some pal of Rasp's hid something useful here.
Some pal of Rasp's hid something useful here.
Nut's Stash
What I stashed there, I don't remember; I was drunk off my ass... and I trusted a Pseudodog to guard my stash... it'll tear a thief apart in one bite, and if not, I'll gnaw his face off myself.
What I stashed there, I don't remember; I was drunk off my ass... and I trusted a Pseudodog to guard my stash... it'll tear a thief apart in one bite, and if not, I'll gnaw his face off myself.
What I stashed there, I don't remember; I was drunk off my ass... and I trusted a Pseudodog to guard my stash... it'll tear a thief apart in one bite, and if not, I'll gnaw his face off myself.
Nut's Tip
Supposedly Ghost was setting up a den here. Stashed various junk too, so he could run to Pripyat light. The lead is solid. Only we can't check it...
Supposedly Ghost was setting up a den here. Stashed various junk too, so he could run to Pripyat light. The lead is solid. Only we can't check it...
Supposedly Ghost was setting up a den here. Stashed various junk too, so he could run to Pripyat light. The lead is solid. Only we can't check it...
Crate on the Locomotive
Hid a bit of loot in a little crate on the roof of the steam engine. Leaving soon...
Hid a bit of loot in a little crate on the roof of the steam engine. Leaving soon...
Hid a bit of loot in a little crate on the roof of the steam engine. Leaving soon...
Seriy's Stash

In the tunnel, in the pipe, I stashed grenades and ammo. Also tucked away an artifact I found right there. Not many people know about this place, so it shouldn't get stolen. Besides, the anomalies at the entrance will kill anyone's urge to crawl in here.

In the tunnel, in the pipe, I put a brand-new piece and some ammo. I'll test it later on weaker mutants, somewhere on the Cordon. Not many people know about this place, so it shouldn't get stolen. Besides, the anomalies at the entrance will kill anyone's urge to crawl in here.

In the tunnel, in the pipe, I hid the gun I traded from Sherstyuk. I'll test it later on weaker mutants, somewhere on the Cordon. Not many people know about this place, so it shouldn't get stolen. Besides, the anomalies at the entrance will kill anyone's urge to crawl in here.
Hollow Stump
I hid artifacts in the stump next to the "Radioactivity" sign.
I hid artifacts in the stump next to the "Radioactivity" sign.
I hid artifacts in the stump next to the "Radioactivity" sign.
Stash Under the Cross
Under the cross, near the bush, I buried a bit of provisions and medicine. And let the artifact I found there lie there for now.
Under the cross, near the bush, I buried some supplies left over after the raid. And let the artifact I found there lie there for now.
Under the cross, near the bush, I buried a gun and a knife I took off a dead bandit. Don't want to show them yet. You never know, one of his buddies might recognize the distinctive piece.
Backpack Under the Tree
Dropped a backpack with a couple of artifacts under the fallen tree. Need to remember to pick it up when I'm heading to Sidorovich.
After the emission hit, I was shaking so badly I dropped my backpack under the fallen tree. Once I'm back on my feet, I'll return and pick it up.
Dropped a backpack with a decent artifact under the fallen tree. Need to remember to pick it up when I'm heading to Sidorovich.
Chimney Sweep's Backpack
Sherstyuk wasn't at the "spot" today. Wanted to try unloading artifacts on him for the machine gun instead of vodka. Fine, I'll leave them here until next time.
Sherstyuk wasn't at the "spot" today. And I dragged him 12 bottles, just like agreed. Fine, I'll leave them here until next time. Some field rations too. Where the hell did I scrape up so many?!
Sherstyuk wasn't at the "spot" today. Wanted to try unloading artifacts on him for the machine gun instead of vodka. Fine, I'll leave them here until next time.
Crate on the Roof
Tucked a crate away on the factory roof; nobody will see it there. Just hope my ammo doesn't rust in the rain.

Tucked a crate away on the factory roof; nobody will see it there. Just hope my meds don't get damp in the rain. The vodka, at least, definitely won't suffer. If anything happens, I'll treat myself with that.
Tucked a crate away on the factory roof; nobody will see it there. Just hope my repair kits don't get ruined in the rain.
Drunkard's Backpack
The military decided to run another raid yesterday. As always, bad timing. Had to run light. Dropped the backpack by the railcar, and there was so much good stuff in it...
The military decided to run another raid yesterday. As always, bad timing. Had to run light. Dropped the backpack by the railcar, and there was so much good stuff in it...
The military decided to run another raid yesterday. As always, bad timing. Had to run light. Dropped the backpack by the railcar, and there was so much good stuff in it...
By the Three Cisterns
Looks like I stumbled onto some stalker's stash under the cross. I'd take the suit from there, but my backpack is already packed full.
At night someone stole some thing from the military, plus ammo for it. Buried it under the cross.
Looks like I stumbled onto a Duty stash under the cross. I'd take the suit from there, but my backpack is already packed full.
Backpack on the Window
In the eastern building I hid a backpack with loot so cleverly you can't see it from below. There are a couple of artifacts inside.
In the eastern building I hid a backpack with supplies and ammo so cleverly you can't see it from below.
In the eastern building I hid a backpack with ammunition so cleverly you can't see it from below.
Radioactive Crate
Dyudyay left me his favorite suit. It's hidden in the eastern building. I just need to get hold of some antirads before going in for it; the place is seriously hot.
Dyudyay left me his favorite gun. It's hidden in the eastern building. I just need to get hold of some antirads before going in for it; the place is seriously hot.

Dyudyay lost his last stash in a dice game. Says he hid extra ammo and a few repair kits in the eastern building. Need to get hold of some antirads before going after that loot; the place is seriously hot.
Crate in the Stairwell
They say a group of stalkers set up a rainy-day stash in the eastern building. Hid everything in the crate under the stairs. Would be nice to rummage through it quietly.
They say a group of stalkers set up a rainy-day stash in the eastern building. Hid everything in the crate under the stairs. Would be nice to rummage through it quietly.
They say a group of stalkers set up a rainy-day stash in the eastern building. Hid everything in the crate under the stairs. Would be nice to rummage through it quietly.
Factory Crate
Why did I trade for so much with that soldier?! Can't carry it all in one trip. Need to make a stash. I can see just the right crate to hide this junk in.
Why did I trade for so much with that soldier?! Can't carry it all in one trip. Need to make a stash. I can see just the right crate to hide this junk in.
First time I've found an artifact like this. Need to ask the old hands what it could sell for. I'll hold onto it for now. I can see just the right crate to hide it in.
Bag on the Support

I was digging through supplies when Bogdan gave the alarm. I tossed the bag onto the support and ran for it. Wonder who he spotted? The military, or those strange types who've taken to prowling around here lately?

I was digging through supplies when Bogdan gave the alarm. I tossed the bag onto the support and ran for it. Wonder who he spotted? The military, or those strange types who've taken to prowling around here lately?

I was digging through supplies when Bogdan gave the alarm. I tossed the bag onto the support and ran for it. Wonder who he spotted? The military, or those strange types who've taken to prowling around here lately?
Junk Crate

Good thing I decided to look in that tool crate. Some stalker set up a stash here. Fine, no time for it now. When I'm coming back from the meet, then I'll take everything. Just hope the owner doesn't show up first.

Good thing I decided to look in that tool crate. Some stalker set up a stash here. Fine, no time for it now. When I'm coming back from the meet, then I'll take everything. Just hope the owner doesn't show up first.

Good thing I decided to look in that tool crate. Some stalker set up a stash here. Fine, no time for it now. When I'm coming back from the meet, then I'll take everything. Just hope the owner doesn't show up first.
Safe Under the Tree
Didn't think I'd turn out to be such a weakling. Found a safe under the fallen tree. Good place to dump extra weight. It fit the body armor I traded from the military, shot, canned food, and medkits.

Pressed some young guy here, stripped a bit of junk off him. Tomorrow the boys from Boar's crew should show up; I'll hand it all to them to grease palms. Let the junk sit in the safe for now, under the fallen tree.
Now that's luck - found two artifacts by the swamp! Better not let Savitsky see. Spotted a safe nearby under the fallen tree; I'll stash them in it.
Things in the Pipe

Yesterday I saw that deserter, the one sitting in the wagon in the middle of the swamp, hiding some junk in the pipe. And he also plays orphan, begging stalkers for food... He'd be worth shaking down properly.

Yesterday I saw that deserter, the one sitting in the wagon in the middle of the swamp, hiding some junk in the pipe. And he also plays orphan, begging stalkers for food... He'd be worth shaking down properly.

Yesterday I saw that deserter, the one sitting in the wagon in the middle of the swamp, hiding some junk in the pipe. And he also plays orphan, begging stalkers for food... He'd be worth shaking down properly.
Radioactive Pipe

Mikhас was saying that the stalkers who set up camp in the eastern complex have a stash nearby. Supposedly there's a pipe under the trailer frame, and they keep loot in it. But you can't just walk up to it; the radiation all around is wild.

Mikhас was saying that the stalkers who set up camp in the eastern complex have a stash nearby. Supposedly there's a pipe under the trailer frame, and they keep loot in it. But you can't just walk up to it; the radiation all around is wild.

Mikhас was saying that the stalkers who set up camp in the eastern complex have a stash nearby. Supposedly there's a pipe under the trailer frame, and they keep loot in it. But you can't just walk up to it; the radiation all around is wild.
not used
not used
not used
not used
Safe Under the Bush

I saw from the roof through binoculars how a little soldier on the hill hid something under a bush. Saving up for discharge, no doubt. I'll wait a few days; maybe he'll drag more loot there, then I'll rummage through it.

I saw from the roof through binoculars how a little soldier on the hill hid something under a bush. Saving up for discharge, no doubt. I'll wait a few days; maybe he'll drag more loot there, then I'll rummage through it.
I saw from the roof through binoculars how a stalker on the hill hid something under a bush. I'll wait a few days; maybe he'll drag more loot there, then I'll rummage through it.
Archive Box

They say Duty members from Yantar sometimes raid Agroprom, supposedly to thin out the mutant population. They keep some gear somewhere there too, so they don't have to haul it back and forth. Would be nice to find their stash...

They say Duty members from Yantar sometimes raid Agroprom, supposedly to thin out the mutant population. They keep some gear somewhere there too, so they don't have to haul it back and forth. Would be nice to find their stash...

They say Duty members from Yantar sometimes raid Agroprom, supposedly to thin out the mutant population. And the artifacts they find along the way are hidden somewhere there too, so they don't have to share with command and can quietly sell them to Sidorovich later. Would be nice to find their stash...
Under the Hatch
Dryukha swore he knows where smugglers leave supplies for long crossings. Where the trail to the Swamps starts, there's an inconspicuous little hatch in the grass. They hide them under the cover.
Dryukha swore he knows where smugglers leave supplies for long crossings. Where the trail to the Swamps starts, there's an inconspicuous little hatch in the grass. They hide them under the cover.

Dryukha swore he knows where the client leaves payment for the smugglers. They always collect it on the way back. Basically, where the trail to the Swamps starts, there's an inconspicuous little hatch in the grass. They hide it under the cover.
Under the Bush by the Wall

Finally found a decent little place to store loot and spare gear. I'm sick of constantly kicking money to Stas so he'll watch my stuff. Here, right beside the military, nobody will crawl around for sure, so I don't have to worry about it staying put.

Finally found a decent little place to store loot and spare gear. I'm sick of constantly kicking money to Stas so he'll watch my stuff. Here, right beside the military, nobody will crawl around for sure, so I don't have to worry about it staying put.

Finally found a decent little place to store loot and spare gear. I'm sick of constantly kicking money to Stas so he'll watch my stuff. Here, right beside the military, nobody will crawl around for sure, so I don't have to worry about it staying put.
Institute Crate
not used
not used
not used
Agro Safe
not used
not used
not used
Truck Bed
not used
not used
not used
Rotten Log

Kiryukha gave me a lead on a little soldier's stash from the military base, the ones holed up in the Research Institute. He was afraid to climb in himself, might get spotted, but I'll go at night. Basically, he saw some rookie pretend he went off to take a piss, but really he was hiding something in a rotten log, under a bush, next to the fence.

Kiryukha gave me a lead on a little soldier's stash from the military base, the ones holed up in the Research Institute. He was afraid to climb in himself, might get spotted, but I'll go at night. Basically, he saw some rookie pretend he went off to take a piss, but really he was hiding something in a rotten log, under a bush, next to the fence.

Kiryukha gave me a lead on a little soldier's stash from the military base, the ones holed up in the Research Institute. He was afraid to climb in himself, might get spotted, but I'll go at night. Basically, he saw some rookie pretend he went off to take a piss, but really he was hiding something in a rotten log, under a bush, next to the fence.
Quartermaster's Crate
not used
not used
not used
Mechanic's Inventory
not used
not used
not used
Hidden Backpack
Swiped a whole 200 rounds of 7.62 and a damn decent gun. Hid the backpack near the Duty base. I'll pick it up later.
Semyon said he stashed a decent suit at the Bar, a trophy from one of the raids.
Hid a backpack by the Duty base. I'll pick it up later.
Abandoned Backpack

Damn dogs! If I hadn't dropped the backpack, I'd never have made it to the outpost. Hated leaving it. There's a battery and 3 armor repair kits in the backpack. But the main thing is a basic artifact.
A big pack of dogs chased me... if I hadn't dropped the backpack, I never would have made it to the outpost.
On the road to the Bar there's an old Moskvich with a yellow roof; I left the backpack in it.
Stash Under the Cross
Couldn't carry it all - took only the artifacts, left the ammo under the cross, 5.45 and shot.
Greetings from Stas. The cross with the gas cylinders is near the Duty checkpoint at the Bar.
Everything that was left got buried under the cross.
Backpack
Dropped the backpack here - it'll be easier that way.
Medicine and food for a rainy day.
Dropped the backpack here, it'll be a bit easier. There's a spare sturdy suit and some grub in it.
Stockpile in the Bunker
The Duty outpost's gear is stored in the bunker, but nobody watches the crate.
The Duty outpost's gear is stored in the bunker, but nobody watches that chest.
The guys at the Bar were saying Duty members at the checkpoint keep artifacts in a crate. Once they collect enough, they turn them in to Petrenko, and then he carries them to the eggheads at Yantar.
Stash
Saw a Duty member shove something into the pipe near the outpost. Need to check.
Saw a Duty member shove something into the pipe near the outpost. Need to check.
Saw a Duty member shove something into the pipe near the outpost. Need to check.
Stash Under the Cross
Put all Seryoga's junk in the stash under the cross. We'll split it with the guys later.
Put all Seryoga's junk in the stash under the cross. We'll split it with the guys later.
Put all Seryoga's junk in the stash under the cross. We'll split it with the guys later.
Backpack
Left a backpack with food in the hangar. Need to pick it up.
I was walking to the Bar, left the backpack in the hangar.
Saw Overload duck into the hangar with a little backpack and come out without it. Once he leaves the Bar, I'll need to see what he hid there.
Electrical Panel Stash
What Baragoz was blabbing about is on Duty territory, in the electrical panel.
Set aside a stash in the hangar's electrical panel.
They say something valuable is lying on Duty territory, in the electrical panel.
Stash on the Tower
Hid a little crate on the tower near Duty so nobody would notice.
Ammo for the rifle. Stuffed it into a little crate at the top of the tower near Duty.
In the tower at the Bar, right under the roof, there's a little crate tucked away so neatly nobody will find it.
Stash in the Tower
Ammo for the 47, three hundred rounds. Hid it in the pipe under the stairs.
Hid it in the pipe under the stairs.
Traded successfully for medicine with Sakharov on the last run.
Arnie's Stash
Buried the goods not far from the bar, behind the anomalies. You need to pry the little door there, and it'll open right away.
Buried the goods not far from the bar, behind the anomalies. You need to pry the little door there, and it'll open right away.
Banker paid his debt, buried it behind the anomalies in a safe.
Stash
Buried it in a pipe behind the chain-link fence among the anomalies. Need to talk to Banker.
Share from the last batch of goods.
Hid the take not far from the Bar.
Crate
In a crate near the Bar.
Left my goods in the crate next to the generator so the duty man would keep an eye on them.
In a crate near the bar. Zorka and a couple of batteries.
Little Crate
Tomorrow Gypsy and I are going to the Red Forest. Put my goods in a little crate for now.
Hid a little crate in the alley near the Bar.
In the nook near the bar, I tucked my collection into a little crate.
Stash
Buried it under the cross, behind the fir trees.
Behind the northern checkpoint by the fir trees is a cross; Vitka Yaroshevich's suit is there.
A strange piece of crap, and more than one. Buried it under the cross, behind the fir trees.
Stash
Under the cross, not far from the passage to the Wild Territory.
A rarity. Stashed it for the right occasion.
Under the cross, not far from the passage to the Wild Territory.
Little Crate
In the pipe near the Arena, a little crate with medicine.
Hid a little crate with antirad in the pipe near the Arena.
Hid grenade launcher rounds in the pipe.
Stash
Take it to Sakharov. Under the tower, in the pipe.
Hid the stuff under the tower, in the pipe.
Take it to Sakharov. Under the tower, in the pipe.
Stash
Under the cross. Gun, ammo.
Under the cross. Deliver it to Sakharov with the next chance.
Under the cross. For Crowbar; he'll pick it up himself, the situation was explained to him.
Railcar Above the Bridge
During the regrouping, I hid ammunition in the railcar. Need to remember.
During the regrouping, I hid ammunition in the railcar. Need to remember.
Quietly stashed my artifacts here at night. No one will get to them here for sure.
Fallen Man's Belongings
Saw a Bloodsucker dry out a stalker. The dead man's loot is nothing special. Decided to stash it for now.
Near the railway tunnel in the forest, a stalker got killed in an anomaly, so I hid his gear. Jacket and shot.
Saw some stalker get killed in an anomaly near the railway tunnel in the forest. His gear looked pretty decent.
Cross Near the Bandit Camp
I hid the loot near the bandit camp, under the cross.
A loner got cocky, decided to pocket an artifact, and could have lived. Now he lies under the cross guarding the artifact.
Scammed a sucker out of some artifacts. Let them lie there until we move out.
Bandit Stockpile
Swiped loot from Mityay. Until they catch on, I decided to hide it...
A crate intercepted by bandits was found in the attic of the central building. Need to prepare a squad and take it back.
Tomorrow the boss comes for the common fund. He's not getting my artifact.
Under the Cross
Dropped a soldier. His loot is total junk, but there are rounds by the bucket. Decided to bury some of it.
Conned a stalker out of two artifacts. Tossing them into the common fund? Like hell. Hid them here.
When my pals and I were fighting off the dogs in uniform, I buried some goods under the cross. Let it sit there.
Attic Shelter
I shoved the backpack into the attic. I'll come back for it later; can't right now.
Saw a soldier hiding clear booze. He can forget it, no vodka for him. Hid it on the roof of one of the houses. Later I'll sit with the guys and thank that soldier.
Stashed the loot in the attic. I'll come back later; can't right now.
Safe on the Farm
Found a half-buried safe on the farm; I'll store my goods there for now. So far I hid a jacket, weapon repair kits, a TOZ, and 40 rounds of shot.
Found a half-buried safe on the farm - for now I'll keep my goods in it.
Soldiers are bastards... Shot me. I can't haul the booze myself. Until I recover, I'll have to leave it here.
Container in the Railcar
The boys whispered that someone hides something in the railcar on the bridge; need to look on the way back. Only it's scary, there are Jelly anomalies all over...
Yesterday I was talking life with Trunk, and that sucker slipped up, blurted about gear on the Cordon, in the railcar. Kept quiet about the Jelly anomalies, the little bastard.
Benya got drunk and slipped up, blurted about his stash on the Cordon. Guess he knows no one will go in there because of the Jelly anomalies...
Stalker's Goods
Hid the goods right under the roof, in the little house by the bridge.
Hid everything I agreed on with Kiryukha in the little house by the bridge, right under the roof. An artifact and a bit of ammo.
The soldiers have completely lost it. Had to run from the raid. Left all the profit on the roof.
Things Near the Bridge
Now that was lucky. Dogs tore a soldier apart. Hid all his belongings here.
Hid the gear in one of the crates near the bridge. That's it, I'm done. I'm leaving the Zone, farewell, brothers! I won't forget my dear mother!
I'm starting to worry about my property. The boys are looking at me sideways. Hid part of it, just in case.
Backpack Near the Village
Not far from the rookie camp, some stalker vanished; I should check his goods. They say he was hauling them back from a raid.
Some guy gave me a little lead here on a backpack. Said it was cursed, so not many people want to take it. What's so valuable in it, I don't know.
Not far from the rookie camp, some stalker died... I should check his goods.
Attic in the Village
There's a stash in the attic; I learned about it from Daring. He ran his mouth too much, so we stitched him up.
Set up an emergency reserve for a rainy day in the attic, in Vergas's house.
Found out from Daring about a stash in the attic. Supposedly there's a brand-new armor vest there.
Convenient Spot

Spotted a sweet little place for a stash in the attic. People have already crawled around there so many times they probably won't search it. Put a bit of junk there as a test. If it gets stolen, no big loss.

Spotted a sweet little place for a stash in the attic. People have already crawled around there so many times they probably won't search it. Put a bit of junk there as a test. If it gets stolen, no big loss.

Spotted a sweet little place for a stash in the attic. People have already crawled around there so many times they probably won't search it. Put a bit of junk there as a test. If it gets stolen, no big loss.
Vorpal's Stash
There's a stalker stash in the attic; learned about it from Vorpal. Our boys were scouting the area. We'll check it.
I was gathering it for Kuznetsov, but it never came in handy.
There's a stash in the attic; learned about it from Vorpal. Our boys were scouting the area. We'll check it.
Commander's Valuables
They say the commander has a clever drawer in his office, and it's packed with valuable goods!
They say the commander has a clever drawer in his office, and it's packed with valuable goods.
They say the commander has a clever drawer in his office, and it's packed with valuable goods.
By the Country Road
Kovalchuk said yesterday that a stalker got taken out near the rookie camp; he was bragging about good loot under the bridge.
Not far from the rookie camp, some stalker died; I should check what he was carrying. Who even lets people like that in here?
Vityunya said some smartass set up a stash beyond the road, among the rocks. Probably skimmed the loot, the rat.
Thieves' Attic
Damn bandits showed up. Had to hide the loot in the attic. Now I just need to find the right moment and pick it up.
Lifted a little device from Limp; I'll unload it on some outsider.
Hid the loot in the bandits' attic while they were gone. Now I just need to choose the moment and take it back.
Gas Pipe
Found it in a pipe not far from the farm. Once my guardhouse stint is over, I'll definitely come back.
Shot a soldier by accident. He fired at me first. Hid his gear in a rusty pipe. When I head back to the trader, I'll trade it for something useful.
Found some gear in a pipe not far from the farm. Once the guardhouse stint is over, I'll definitely come back and pick it up.
Hidden Things
Saw a backpack in an overturned car next to some corpses; should check what's in it, but the radiation there is no joke.
Dropped a backpack not far from the post... need to grab it quickly before the commander moves us somewhere else.
Watched the soldiers deal with the bandits. The soldiers didn't bother searching the bodies. After the soldiers left, I took a Duty suit off one of the corpses.
Checkpoint Tower
A crate with supplies is on the tower. Pick it up Tuesday, before the shift.
Forgot my binoculars on the tower by the Garbage while we were watching for the fools.
Left a crate on the tower temporarily. I'll pick it up when I can.
Backpack in the Tree
Sick of rats dragging everything from the crate by the campfire. I'll keep my stuff here.
My buddy was lying by the campfire today, saying he tossed a bag with loot into a tree near the village.
Tossed the hide into the tree, away from greedy eyes.
Little Drawer in the Nightstand
Heard Seriy's crew keeps ammunition in the nightstand by the soda machine. Would be nice to check quietly.

I was going to sleep on the little couch in the hangar and put an artifact in the nightstand. An emission woke everyone up at night, and all hell broke loose. One thing led to another, and it was already morning. In the chaos I forgot to grab my stuff, in short. Still can't get around to going back.

I was going to sleep on the little couch in the hangar and put an artifact with some other odds and ends in the nightstand. An emission woke everyone up at night, and all hell broke loose. One thing led to another, and it was already morning. In the chaos I forgot to grab my stuff, in short. Still can't get around to going back.
Old Crane
Tyapa took off for Foggy Thicket at night; he's got a meeting there. Asked me to keep an eye on the pipe on the crane.
Vasya and I went to see what was going on, and a cop's bullet found Vasya right there. I had nothing to do with it. A bullet's a fool. Stashed the little things in the pipe on the crane.
Vasya and I went to see what was going on... that's where a cop's bullet caught Vasya. I had nothing to do with it. A bullet's a fool. Hid the junk in the pipe on the crane.
Grizzly's Things
At the Garbage, in the railway tunnel behind the diesel engine, Grizzly bought it with all his junk. Shame about the guy.
At the Garbage, in the railway tunnel behind the diesel engine, Grizzly bought it with all his junk. Shame about the guy.
Gloomy has completely lost his mind - dragged the common loot into the tunnel behind the diesel engine, and the radiation there is so bad your balls glow.
Pipe on the Northern Heap
Stashed the loot in a pipe at the Garbage. For the "nuclear war" case - antirads and vodka.
Here are coordinates for a loot stash. Main thing is, don't cook your balls there - the radiation is off the scale.
Hid the loot in a pipe at the Garbage.
Stash in the Scrap Metal
The stuff is at the Garbage, in one of the pipes. If you don't know exactly where, you'll never find it.
We were throwing junk into an anomaly and accidentally threw in the pipe we used to hide loot inside. So there it lies, gathering dust.
The stuff is at the Garbage, in one of the pipes. If you don't know exactly where, you'll never find it. And there's a Beretta 92 and fifty armor-piercing rounds for it.
Cast-Iron Pipe by the Cisterns
Saved something for the way back when I ran to Lyoha Junkman. I'll pick it up next time.
Saved something for the way back when I ran to Lyoha Junkman. I'll pick it up next time.
Saved something for the way back when I ran to Lyoha Junkman. I'll pick it up next time.
Pipe on the Eastern Heap
We shook down a stalker. Turned out he was a glutton. Stashed part of the food in a pipe.
Some useful things are hidden among the radioactive trash, where few people wander.
Some useful things are hidden among the radioactive trash, where few people go.
Ownerless Backpack

I was coming from Dark Valley and a pack of dogs latched onto me. While I was running, I didn't notice a Springboard in my path. It clipped my back with the very edge, but hard enough that the backpack flew off. It must still be lying somewhere there. Shame, Raven's armor vest was in it. Didn't even get to try it on properly.

I was coming from Dark Valley and a pack of dogs latched onto me. While I was running, I didn't notice a Springboard in my path. It clipped my back with the very edge, but hard enough that the backpack flew off. It must still be lying somewhere there. Shame, there was a good pistol and ammo in it.

I was coming from Dark Valley and a pack of dogs latched onto me. While I was running, I didn't notice a Springboard in my path. It clipped my back with the very edge, but hard enough that the backpack flew off. It must still be lying somewhere there. Shame, there was a heap of useful odds and ends in it.
Dead Man's Things
We killed a rat on the swamp, and buried him there. Left his little stash under the cross; we had no time for it. A stalker suit and 5.45 ammo.
We killed a rat on the swamp, and buried him there. Left his little stash under the cross; we had no time for it.
The other day Tyapa was saying he hid cartridges at the Garbage. Said something about a cross by the swamp.
Rotten Stump
There's a stash in the stump, good place. I hid a Saiga there and 60 rounds of shot for it.
In the little woods past the swamp, I tucked something in a stump as a reserve, so I don't have to drag myself to Vergas again.
There's a stash in the stump. Good place.
Log in the Woods
There's a log in the woods with a hole inside. The stash is in it; time to pick it up.
I was coming out of the woods at the Garbage, heard shots, some thugs were robbing someone. To stay out of trouble, I put the loot here. Need to come back before the emission.
There's a log in the woods, with a hole inside. Three artifacts fit in just right.
Strelok's Group Stockpile

Petrenko said there's information about a stash belonging to Strelok's group at the Garbage. There should be a hatch here in the low ground. He explained the clever way to open it. Once things calm down, I need to run over there.
Diggers said there were rumors of a stash belonging to Strelok's group somewhere in this area. Fang was seen there.

Petrenko passed along information about a stash belonging to Strelok's group at the Garbage. There should be a hatch here in the low ground... he explained the clever way to open it. Once everyone settles down, we'll run over there.
Stash in the Car
Hid it in the car; Lanky said it was a good spot. Put a Beretta there and 9x19 ammo.
Hid the ammo in the "Zaporozhets", not far from the abandoned vehicle depot.
Hid it in the car - Lanky said it was a good spot.
Stalker's Backpack in the Bus
Put the backpack in the bus... doesn't seem noticeable.
Put the backpack in the bus, doesn't seem noticeable. A carbine and ammo for it; I'll still need them.
Semyon, drunk, was boasting that in a week Sultan had promised him a fine gun. In the bus at the Garbage, he said, that's where you'll pick it up.
Latrine Supplies
Hardly anyone would think to hide a stash in the shitter, so I'm almost at ease.
Put the supplies in a crate, in the strange little building around the corner. Still can't figure out what that building used to be for.
Put the supplies in a crate, in the strange little building around the corner. Still can't figure out what that structure was for. Not much of a stockpile, but it'll do for a start.
Safe on the Southern Heap
Took pity on a loner, gave him a bandage... He was dragging himself from the Garbage all beat up, thought he'd croak. As thanks, he gave me a lead on a stash.
There's a half-buried safe on the trash heap; that's where it all is. Hope I don't forget.
There's a half-buried safe on the trash heap; that's where it all is. Hope I don't forget.
Stash in the Scrap Metal
Put the loot in a pipe on the trash heap.
Put the loot in a pipe on the trash heap. 10 VOG-25 rounds.
Set aside a rainy-day stash in a pipe at the Garbage. It's seriously hot.
Reserve in a Crate
Stalkers at the abandoned vehicle depot keep their reserves there.
The chief radioed the order to withdraw. I stumbled onto a crate, dumped the extra weight into it, and pulled back light.
The commander ordered withdrawal over the radio. I stumbled onto a crate, dumped the extra weight into it, and pulled back light. Left a couple hundred armor-piercing rounds of 5.45.
Pipe by the Bus
Shoved the loot into a pipe at the Garbage, next to the "Radioactivity" sign. It won't sit there long.
Stashed field rations; when I head to the Swamps, I need to grab them.
Shoved the loot into a pipe at the Garbage. It won't sit there long.
Backpack in the Ruins
Hid the backpack well in the ruins. I hope it'll be easy to pick up if the bandits don't get in the way. I've got a Deagle there, traded for it at the Army Warehouses, and ammo for it.
We mugged a stalker. He was coming from the center. Split the cash and dumped the artifacts in a stash.
Hid the backpack well in the ruins. I hope it'll be easy to pick up if the bandits don't get in the way.
Crate at the Checkpoint
While the Duty members were shooting it out, I hid the loot in the trailer. Need to get in somehow and pick it up. And say thanks to Duty.
While the Duty members were shooting it out, I hid the loot in the trailer. Need to get in somehow and pick it up - and say thanks to Duty.
Duty post supplies.
Weakling's Backpack
They say Weakling kicked the bucket at the Garbage. Need to pay a visit and check the loot before too many takers come running.

The guys by the fire told how, the other day, a stalker got torn apart by an anomaly down in the low ground, right before their eyes. Seems he was coming from Foggy Thicket. But no one dared go for the backpack.
They say Weakling got himself killed at the Garbage. Need to pay a visit and check the loot before too many takers come running.
String Bag in the Hatch
While the Flesh were sleeping, I put the loot right under their noses... or snouts. Let them guard it until I come back.
While the Flesh were sleeping, I put the loot right under their noses... or snouts. Let them guard it until I come back
While the Flesh were sleeping, I put the loot right under their noses... or snouts. Let them guard it until I come back
Under the Bucket
Now that's luck. Lifted a decent artifact off some skinny bastard. My own guys might steal it. I'll hide it here.
Someone died in an anomaly near the excavator: the backpack is visible, but hard to reach.
Stopped a hunter. The guy "shared" his homemade sausage. Had to stash part of it.
Stash Under the Concrete Blocks
Barely crawled under the beams, but I hid the backpack well; nobody will crawl in here. Food and a cloak - everything needed for a trip.
Traded ammo with some stalkers for artifacts and hid them in the ruins. Otherwise Petrenko will drag everything off to the eggheads at Yantar again.
Barely crawled under the beams, but I hid the backpack well - nobody will get in here.
Stash in a Log
Freedom members shot Kovalts the other day; they hid his piece in a log behind the village.
Shoved the goods into a log. I think they won't find it.
Tried to check the stash Grigorchuk pointed out, but the radiation there is off the scale.
Stash in the Stove
Found myself a slick spot for a stash; no way anyone guesses. Put all the good loot I had here.
Stashed some junk in the stove. Medkits, matches, and antirads.
Hid the junk in the stove.
Stash in the KAMAZ
Hid the junk in the cab of the KAMAZ.
Stashed some junk in the cab of the KAMAZ.
According to Avoska, the cab of the KAMAZ has a batch of goods belonging to some smuggler.
Cache Under the Cross
Some loot bound for the mainland. Max said he knows people who can move it for a good price.
Buried some loot under the cross near the village.
Buried a "Vintorez" under the cross near the village.
Stash in the Pipe
Stuffed some gear into the pipe; I'll pick it up later.
Noticed Gunko ducking into a shed in Bloodsucker Village after the last raid, looking around. Had to be hiding loot.
Shoved some gear into the pipe; I'll pick it up later.
Cache in the Tower
A stash in the water tower, in a crate.
A stash in the water tower, in a crate.
Maybe it's a stash, maybe it isn't, but that crate in the water tower should have some valuable loot in it.
Stove Stash
Shoved a backpack into the stove; it'll come in handy later.
Shoved a backpack into the stove - it'll come in handy later.
Hid grenade rounds for a NATO underbarrel launcher in the village stove; I think they'll come in handy next week.
Car Stash
Seryoga Radkevich gave me a lead on a stash in the village, though he said you can't get anywhere near those "Zhiguli" because of the radiation.
Hid the loot in a car in the abandoned village.
Hid the gear in a car in the abandoned settlement.
Dangerous Secret
Dropped the backpack in the radioactive ruins. Hardly anyone will go in.
Had to ditch a valuable backpack in the village; spent the night running from a Bloodsucker.
Tossed a backpack into the radioactive ruins. They'll be afraid to go in.
Stalker's Stash
Buried the loot under the cross, in a secluded spot.
Buried the piece under the cross, in a secluded spot.
We were coming from Red Forest, hid the extra under the cross so it wouldn't show up at the base.
Backpack with Gear
Stashed a little backpack with gear in a quiet spot.
Prepared a backpack for a raid into Red Forest; "Spartak" promised to show some fine places with loot.
Stashed a little backpack with gear in a quiet spot.
Stash on the Hill
Hid the gear in a car on the hill.
Stashed an artifact and some gear in a car on the hill.
Prepared it for Sakharov; when I head toward Yantar, I need to pick it up.
Crate from the Helicopter
A helicopter crashed near the former military base. The crate is lying nearby, right under the helicopter. Only problem: anomalies and radiation all around.
Rumor has it the helicopter that crashed near the abandoned military base was carrying some rare artifacts. Maybe that's why it fell... The crate is nearby, right under the helicopter.
Seryoga Skabei was coming back from Red Forest the other day and spotted a crate by the crashed helicopter. Tried to go for it, but the radiation there is off the scale.
Stash in the Grave
Efimenko stupidly blundered into a "Witch's Jelly" the other day; in 5 minutes the fighter was gone. We buried his SKAT and "Vintorez" on the hill under the cross.
Supplies for a raid.
Buried the loot on the hill under the cross.
Secret Stump
There's a stash in the stump. Good place.
There's a stash in a stump in the camp by The Barrier. Good place.
Lutsenko, drunk, blurted out that he hid artifacts somewhere in a stump by The Barrier. Probably full of shit.
High-Rigger's Stash
Dropped a backpack with junk in the rusty cabin, not far from The Barrier.
Left the backpack in the crane cab; I'll pick it up later.
Left the backpack in the crane cab; I'll pick it up later.
Agreed-Upon Stash
Put everything in a crate in the railcar, not far from the base. Just like we agreed; now all that's left is to wait. We're clearing out soon.
Intermediate stash 1. Artifacts for the scientists.
Put everything in a crate in the railcar, not far from the base. Just like we agreed; now all that's left is to wait. We're clearing out soon.
Cache in a Log
Shoved the goods into a log. I think they won't find it.
They say some nut settled there on the swamp and guards a stash with loot.
Shoved the goods into a log, I think they won't find it.
Pipe with Loot
Stashed the loot in a pipe on the lakeshore.
The radiation's so bad Snorks die there. Let it lie for now; when I head to Sakharov, I'll pull everything out.
Dovgan was on watch there the other day; through the scope he noticed some stalker fussing around that pipe. Need to check what's there.
Stalker's Stash
Hid the peashooter in the hatch by the base entrance. Didn't pick it up that time; at night I was afraid to crawl through the mines.
Hid some things in the iron contraption.
Hid the things in the iron hulk.
Loot in a Log
Shoved the goods into a log. I think they won't find it.
Shoved the goods into a log, I think they won't find it.
I'll pay back my debt to Chuikevich when he comes back from the raid.
Bison's Crate
Left my hardware with Bison for safekeeping; seems things don't walk off with him.

The guys said Pavlo from Freedom, the one you can win a discount from, hides artifacts in a crack in the buried tunnel. Seems they're only simple trinkets, but still worth a look - might be enough for a can of food or a handful of bullets.
The guys were saying Bison keeps his discount chit in a backpack above the tunnel.
Backpack in the Tunnel
Stashed a backpack with loot in the tunnel.
Romanyuk and his group left for Red Forest in the morning. Lyokha asked me to watch his loot; the backpack is in the tunnel behind the rocks.
Stashed a backpack with loot in the tunnel.
Crate with Goods
A convenient crate for dumping extra junk.
A convenient crate for dumping extra junk.
Set the SVD Dragunov aside in a crate under the tree; once it's sighted in, I can take it on a raid.
Stash in a Log
Shoved the goods into a log, I think they won't find it.
Shoved the goods into a log - I think they won't find it.

The guys said there are artifacts on Tesla like that - find one and you're rich. But they also said even the trees shock you there. No matter, I've got boots, and Screw made me this quilted jacket - you could stick your fingers in a socket and electricity won't touch you! I'll gather more food and head for that Tesla.
Temporary Stash
There's a crate up by the APCs under the canopy; Kravets usually hides artifacts there. Need to check.
Tossed the goods into a crate; I'll pick them up later.
Tossed the goods into a crate. I'll pick them up later.
Steel Stash
That place is safer than a bank. Strangers don't go there, and emissions aren't a problem.
Hid the things in the hatch. They'll come in handy someday.
Stashed a new Kalash in the hatch; once it's sighted in, I can take it on a raid.
Common Crate
The guys toss all kinds of small stuff into a crate in the barracks for the common stash.
Tossed the goods into a crate; I'll pick them up later.
The "orange" holds up pretty well; even found an artifact. For now I'll put everything in the crate.
Stash in the Car
Hid the loot in a car right under Freedom's nose; no time to look for a better place. There's a merc suit, a Battery, and a USP.
Hid the loot in a car right under Freedom's nose. No time to look for a better spot.
Stashed weapons and ammo in the ride, right under Freedom's nose. They don't let you onto their base with guns.
Dead Stalker's Things
They say some stalker on his way from Ivankovsky District Center vanished here. No one's picked up his stuff yet.
They say some well-known stalker died here, and no one's picked up his stuff yet.
They say some stalker on his way from Ivankovsky District Center vanished here. No one's picked up his stuff yet.
Garage Cache
Rumor says there's a chest in the garage with enough loot to make your eyes pop.
I set up a crate in the garage for temporary supplies.
They say there's a crate in the garage, packed with loot like you wouldn't believe.
Old Stash
They say there's a crate in the kindergarten, packed with loot like you wouldn't believe.
They say there's a chest in the kindergarten, and it is loaded with loot. If only I lived that well.
Piled a load of supplies here for easier movement around the city later on.
Fang's Loot
Fang left his loot in Pripyat by the monument, under the cross.
Fang left his loot in Pripyat by the monument, under the cross.
Fang left his loot in Pripyat by the monument, under the cross.
Freedom Leader's Supplies
They say a Freedom group was preparing a breakthrough to the CNPP and set up several gear stashes in Pripyat.

The last anyone knew of him was that he alone survived after the Scorcher. He left his supplies in some old department store and moved on. Everything went off plan, and he was the best leader Freedom ever had.

The last anyone knew of him was that he alone survived after the Scorcher. He left his supplies in some old department store and moved on. Everything went off plan, and he was the best leader Freedom ever had.
Gloomer's Cache
A cross on the road to the Scorcher. I went no farther, hid the big piece and supplies under it.
Gloomer shared the coordinates of an ammunition stash.
Under the cross by the road to the Scorcher, I prepared a stash for a future raid.
Dead Stalker's Loot
Yuri never made it to Radar. He died by the checkpoint with all his gear.
Some stalker died here. His loot is still there; no one can get to it.

We left Radar on the last run toward evening. Petro dawdled by the barrier and stepped into Witch's Jelly. Just like that, the stalker was gone. We dumped his backpack nearby behind the boulders; it was too heavy to haul.
Loot in the Safe
Oleg Maslovsky told how they used a half-buried safe as temporary storage for capsules. Handy, so you don't have to lug everything at once.
Gorobets said he found a half-buried safe in the forest, but the emission stopped him from checking it and he had to leave. At least he wrote down the coordinates.
They say there's a half-buried safe in the forest, and it is full of loot.
Downed Helicopter

I kept telling them not to fly over the Scorcher! Well, there's your result. They came down in the middle of the forest, and I doubt anyone survived. Whatever they handed off to us is lying there somewhere.
Kravchuk keeps pestering me about that helicopter that crashed at Radar. He cannot wait to check what they were trying to haul out of the Zone.
I told them not to fly over the Scorcher, and there you have it. They came down in the middle of the forest; I doubt anyone survived. The forest freaks are guarding a pile of supplies now.
Desperate Group's Supplies

They say the supplies of a group that tried to break through to the center of the Zone through gas-filled laboratories were left there. None of them came back, and the stash is still waiting for someone to pick it up.

People say the supplies of a group that was pushing toward the center of the Zone and walked right into the Scorcher are still there. None of them returned, and the stash is still waiting for someone to pick it up.

Bykhovets knew a stalker whose group tried to reach the North through the laboratories. They made it out, sure, but the Scorcher's radiation would not let them go farther. So they dumped everything extra in a stash and headed back. There was enough oxygen for only one man.
Faction Leader's Loot
They say the leader of some former faction died here, and he had a rich haul on him.
They say the leader of some former faction croaked here. He probably had good loot on him; bosses usually do.
They say the leader of some faction died here, and he had a rich haul on him.
Hidden Backpack
Seryoga Koval is a sharp stalker, not his first month in the Zone. I know he always keeps a stash behind the sheet metal by the passage to the Bar.
Seryoga Koval is a sharp stalker, not his first month in the Zone. I know he always keeps a stash behind the sheet metal by the passage to the Bar.
Seryoga Koval is a sharp stalker, not his first month in the Zone. I know he always keeps a stash behind the sheet metal by the passage to the Bar.
Stash Under the Cross
Hid the goods under the cross.
Hid the trophy junk under the cross. It'll come in handy.
Seryoga Baranets and Dmitruk came back from Rostok the other day and got into it with the mercs there. They hid the loot under the cross.
Crate Under the Little House
Hid something in a crate under the little house. Hope I don't forget.
Hid something in a chest under the little house. Need to remember.
Put a trophy suit in the crate. Gnatyuk asked me to get him something similar.
Stalker's Backpack

Lyokha Umansky, one of our young ones, carried artifacts to the scientists at Yantar for the first time. He never delivered them; snorks and dogs pinned him in the passage. He hid the backpack there too. Smart of him to plant a beacon.
Last run I had no container with me, so I shoved the backpack under the steps. Who knew the mercs would set up there.
I shoved the backpack under the stairs, then those bastards showed up. Filth... how am I supposed to get my stuff back?
Stash Behind the Tree
Wolfhound can be dealt with too. Need to pick up the artifact and armor when I get the chance.
Tishchenko leaked a stash at Rostok: in the corner, behind a tree, a half-buried safe; there's a tower nearby. Need to check.
Here, behind the tree, there's a half-buried safe. My junk can sit here.
Garage Stash
We were clearing the sector of monsters and I unexpectedly found a couple artifacts. Hid them in a crate in the garage.
Everything we grabbed during the raid, we hid in a chest in the garage.
Everything we grabbed during the raid, we hid in a crate in the garage.
Hidden Crate
Hid a few things in the crate behind the booth.
Misha Ostapchuk let slip while drunk that he has a little crate of goods there.
Hid a few things in the crate behind the booth.
Backpack in a Stash
Shoved the backpack into a hole; it does not seem visible from above.
Shoved the backpack into a hole; it does not seem visible from above.
Dropped the backpack with the loot while running from snorks. Damn shame. All I saw was them dragging it into the hangar.
Crate in a Secluded Spot
Won it off Squinty at cards. He said they jumped a stalker on his way to the scientists at Yantar and hid his artifacts in this crate.
Hid the goods in a quiet spot.
Hid a little crate in a quiet spot. Rounds, grenades, and an interesting artifact for a rainy day.
Stalker's Stash
Tossed the backpack under the broken roof. For a rainy day. A battery, a suit, and 5.56 rounds.
Prokopchuk signaled the other day that there is a stash at Rostok, under the very roof of the radioactive house.
There's a backpack under the roof, and something inside for a rainy day.
Safe in the House
They say there is a safe in this little house, and something pretty good inside.
They say Wolfhound's people hide their arsenal in the radioactive house.
They say there is a safe in this little house, and something is hidden inside.
Stash in the Pipe
Hid it in the little house, in the pipe. Careful, everything there is hot.
Hid it in the little house, in the pipe. Careful - the whole place is hot as hell.
Hid it in the little house, in the pipe. Careful, everything there is hot.
Hidden Little Crate
Set aside repair kits for later in the locker.
What we agreed on, you'll take from the little crate. Usually no one looks in there.
What we agreed on, you'll take from the crate... usually no one looks in there.
Stash Under the Cross
Hid it under the cross, in the alley.
Dropped the extra junk with the backpack under the cross. Otherwise I would not have made it to the scientists at Yantar.
Hid it under the cross, in the alley. Packed provisions, medicine, and an artifact for a rainy day.
Stash Under Concrete
Hid the extra supplies at the construction site, under the concrete. Put an AK-47 and ammo for it there.
Hid the extra supplies at the construction site, under the concrete.
Karpovich swore he left our supplies in a crate at the construction site.
Lucky's Stash
We'll keep the loot in the chest at the construction site. It'll come in handy if we have to save our own skins.
In case we need to take off quickly, we'll put the loot into the chest at the construction site.
We'll keep the loot in the crate at the construction site, in case we have to run for it.
Stash
Last week a Duty member got stripped at Rostok. His suit is still lying there behind the slabs.
Hid a backpack with finds at the construction site, in the alley.
Hid it at the construction site, in the alley.
Stash in the Pipe
Stuffed everything into some pipe. We'll pick it up later.
Hid the medicine in a pipe under the slabs for now.
Stuffed everything into some pipe; we'll pick it up later. Repair kits, an HK USP pistol, and ammo for it.
Crate with Medical Supplies
Hid medical supplies in a crate not far from the construction site.
Hid artifacts in a crate not far from the construction site.
A crate of medicine for the soul.
Crate on the Crane
Hauled a gun and ammo into the crane cab.
What you're owed now is in the crane cab.
Hauled the chest into the crane cab.
Stash in the Hatch
In the corner behind the railroad, I locked my goods under the hatch.
The artifacts I found on yesterday's run are hidden under a hatch at Rostok for now.
In the corner behind the railroad, in the hatch, I wrapped the artifact in a suit.
Dropped Backpack
I went after an artifact and hit an anomaly. I can barely walk. Dropped the backpack with the loot in the corner behind the railroad.
I went after an artifact and hit an anomaly. I can barely crawl. Dropped the backpack in the corner behind the railroad.
Gavrilyuk lost our backpack in the dark. Says he was running from dogs. We'll have to look for it.
Little Crate Under the Roof
Up top, under the roof near the tower, I shoved the little chest where no one would notice.
Found a couple of decent artifacts and hid them in a little crate. I'll search around a bit more and take them when I head back.
Up top, under the roof near the tower, I put some food and an artifact in there so no one would notice.
Stash in the Pipe
We hid the fine find in the pipe not far from the construction site.
What we found, we hid in the pipe not far from the construction site.
What we found, we hid in the pipe not far from the construction site.
Stash
I traded for a good suit from the scientists at Yantar and found some strange artifact. Stuffed the artifact and an old armored vest into a log by the road at Rostok.
Shoved the goods into a log - I think they won't find it.
Shoved the goods into a log; I think they won't find it.
Backpack
Vanya Demyanyuk complained that he spotted a little backpack up by the crane but never checked what was in it.
Stashed a backpack with artifacts near the crane.
Stashed a backpack near the crane.
Stash Under the Cross
We broke the big guy and took his piece. In the meantime, I shoved it into the stash under the cross. Later we'll decide which of the boys gets it.
Vovan was one unlucky stump. Got drunk and climbed a fir tree to watch for stalkers. We buried him under the cross and hid the coat nearby. Later we'll decide who's worthy of wearing it.
We broke the big guy and took his piece. In the meantime, I shoved it into the stash under the cross. Later we'll decide which of the boys gets it.
Stash in the Log
Shoved the goods into a log - I think they won't find it.
I see Semyon sneaking around that little swamp like he's hiding something there. Old fox.
Shoved the goods into a log; I think they won't find it. It is pretty hot there too.
Backpack Under the Bridge
Shoved the backpack under the bridge; let it sit there for now. I'll pick it up when I head to the Bar.
Shoved the backpack under the bridge; let it sit there for now.
Dropped the loot here. It is a little hot there, so no one will take it.
Car with a Stash

Goga Krest kept bragging about the mines he set for stalkers. Got up to take a piss at night and stepped on his own mine, the fool. We hid what was left of his in a crate. Later we'll decide what's there and who gets it.

Goga Krest kept bragging about the mines he set for stalkers. Got up to take a piss at night and stepped on his own mine, the fool. We hid what was left of his in a crate. Later we'll decide what's there and who gets it.

Goga Krest kept bragging about the mines he set for stalkers. Got up to take a piss at night and stepped on his own mine, the fool. We hid what was left of his in a crate. Later we'll decide what's there and who gets it.
Stash in a Stump
There's a stash in the stump. Good spot.
Raspy started throwing his weight around too much. Until he cools off, we hid his piece in a stump.
There's a stash in the stump, good spot. Just right for food.
Crate with Supplies
They say stalkers keep a hell of a lot of ammo on that farm.
Found a fine sturdy chest on the farm, so we'll store supplies there for now.
Spotted a good crate on the farm, just right for storing small loot.
Stash in the Pipe
Tossed the gear into the pipe; I'll pick it up later.
Put the NATO rounds I found in someone else's stash at Garbage into the pipe.
Tossed the gear into the pipe; I'll pick it up later.
Stash Under the Fir Tree
Dropped Kolyan's backpack under the fir tree; there was no way I could haul that much on myself!
Dropped Kolyan's backpack under the fir tree; there was no way I could haul that much on myself!
Dropped Kolyan's backpack under the fir tree; there was no way I could haul that much on myself!
Government Crate
The new guy managed to swipe a crate from the bandits and put it in the overturned Niva. Says it looks like a government crate. We'll have to gear up the boys and go get it.
The new guy managed to swipe a crate from the bandits and put it in the overturned Niva. Says it looks official. We'll have to tell the boys to pick it up.
Borov asked me to set up a stash in the overturned Niva - for some important bastard.
Crate
Stiffed the boys on a ration. Not according to the code, but you cannot order your belly around.
Thieves everywhere, already stealing from their own, but they won't find my little crate.
Thieves everywhere, already stealing from their own, but they won't find my little chest, he-e-ey, they won't find it!
Stash in the Hatch
I copied from Andryukha's PDA that he hid his loot in a hatch before heading North. I'll pay it a visit; maybe something is still left.
I copied from Andryukha's PDA that he hid his loot in a hatch before heading North. I'll pay it a visit; maybe something is still left.
I copied from Andryukha's PDA that he hid his loot in a hatch before heading North. I'll pay it a visit; maybe something is still left.
Stalker's Backpack
Dropped the backpack under a tree; otherwise I would not have gotten away from the bandits. Lost an artifact, ammo, and a few little things. Maybe I can get back for it later?!
Dropped the backpack under a tree - with it, I would not have escaped the bandits.
An emission was starting, so I threw the backpack under this tree in a hurry. Otherwise, with that weight, I would have stayed under that tree myself.
Stash
Heh-heh... I'm like a stalker. Imagine that! Didn't shake anyone down; found an artifact myself. Decided to stash it.
Put the junk in the pipe; I'll pick it up later.
Put the junk in the pipe. I'll pick it up later.
Hidden Safe
I'm sick of this, honestly. No proper take coming in... and I'm still supposed to kick up to the crew fund. I'll play poor; maybe it'll fly. Hid a few things in the safe under the fir.
I'm sick of this, honestly. No proper take coming in... and I'm still supposed to kick up to the crew fund. I'll play poor; maybe it'll fly. Hid a few things in the safe under the fir.
I'm sick of this, honestly. No proper take coming in... and I'm still supposed to kick up to the crew fund. I'll play poor; maybe it'll fly. Hid a few things in the safe under the fir.
Stockpile in the Trailer
A crate with Vitka's gear. He sent me the coordinates just in case, then vanished in Foggy Thicket. Need to see what's there.
Temporary headquarters in the trailer; the supply chest is there too.
Temporary headquarters in the trailer; the crate with weapons and medicine is there too.
Secret Spot in the Pipe
Barely fought off the snorks. Had to hide in the pipe. Put some junk there to make it easier to get away. I'll come back later.

Barely fought off the snorks. Had to hide in the pipe, and someone had set up a stash there, hiding artifacts. I did not take them right away; every kilogram matters now. Let me get out first, then I'll come back for that loot.
Barely fought off the snorks. Had to hide in the pipe. Put some unnecessary gear there to make it easier to get away. I'll come back later.
Crate with Goods
Threw the goods into the chest. We'll pick them up later.
Found a bandit's remains in the Valley. Strange that the backpack was intact. Put everything that was there right here.
Threw the goods into the crate. We'll pick them up later.
Stash Behind the Pipe
I'm hiding the loot behind the pipe. Hard to reach, but at least no one will steal it.
I'm hiding the loot behind the pipe. Hard to reach, but at least they won't steal the precious thing.
Hid the backpack on the pipe parapet behind the factory. No fool is climbing up there.
Stash in the Electrical Panel
The cut from the last job is in the electrical panel on the second floor of the factory. Climb in easy; the electricity ran out there long ago.
Hid rounds in the electrical panel.
Hid rounds in the electrical panel on the second floor of the factory.
Stash Crate
Good people told me the other day about a stash belonging to our enemies. Clean it out, be kind!
Everything we found, we left in the crate. We'll pick it up on the way back.
Senya tucked everything we gathered into the crate under the bed. We'll pick it up when we head home.
Hidden Backpack
Some digger decided to carry off the loot, but Shepherd and his boys got on his tail. They dealt with the guy and hid the backpack.
We hid the new guy's backpack. He never found it.
We hid the new guy's backpack, heh-heh! He never found it.
Forgotten Crate
There is a chest left in the van; need to pick it up.
There is a crate left in the van by the bus stop. Should pick the goods out of it.
Kolyan sent word that Feeble hides loot in that van.
Safe at the Gas Station
Zhora Locomotive kicked the bucket. Caught a bullet from the Duty grunts. We put his things in the safe.
Found a safe at the gas station and hid the goods there. Seems like hardly anyone passes through...
Mytyay was poking around the gas station at night and found a safe. Says there's so much good stuff there you cannot carry it all at once.
Crate
Withered, the bastard, keeps taking all the loot for himself. God-damned old man! Bit by bit, I'm hiding junk from him in a crate on the tanker.
The boys and I hauled the common-fund crate onto the tanker, farther from Borov.
Yakimchuk told me the other day how some drifters knocked over an army guy. Seems he was looking for trouble. They hauled his things toward the gas station.
Safe at the Gas Station
Hid supplies in the safe at the gas station.
I did not know if I'd get out of that mess alive, so I shoved my things into the rusty safe at the gas station.
Hid supplies in the safe at the gas station.
Crate in the Car
While those freaks wonder where the goods from their stashes keep going, my little crate keeps filling up.
There's some crate in a car where the bandit camp is. Need to sneak in quietly - I feel there's something to profit from there!
In the bandit camp, in a military UAZ, there is a crate. Sologub said there's something worth taking there, but how do I get close to it?
Crate in a Stash
Borov has started looking at me sideways. I'll gather some dough and head out to find a new place.
Borov has started looking at me sideways. I'll gather some dough and head out to find a new place.
Borov has started looking at me sideways. I'll gather some dough and head out to find a new place.
Left Backpack
Tokha, it's Owl. Buddy, pick up my backpack. It is in the abandoned building with the garages, on the second floor. Then get moving quick to our spot.
Tokha, it's Owl. Buddy, pick up my backpack. It is in the abandoned building with the garages, on the second floor. Then get moving quick to our spot.
Tokha, it's Owl. Buddy, pick up my backpack. It is in the abandoned building with the garages, on the second floor. Then get moving quick to our spot.
Stash in the Safe

Feeble said someone from Borov's crew keeps his goods in a half-buried safe beyond the ditch. Smart spot - it is plenty hot there. And what fool would try to gut a bandit stash? More trouble than it's worth.

Feeble said someone from Borov's crew keeps his goods in a half-buried safe beyond the ditch. Smart spot - it is plenty hot there. And what fool would try to gut a bandit stash? More trouble than it's worth.

Feeble said someone from Borov's crew keeps his goods in a half-buried safe beyond the ditch. Smart spot - it is plenty hot there. And what fool would try to gut a bandit stash? More trouble than it's worth.
Backpack in a Secret Place
Hid a backpack with a Kalash near the building, behind a slab. That Kalash brought me luck more than once. Lucky Kalash.
Raponya went drunk to hide a nice artifact in a backpack, then forgot where he put it. Good thing I followed him.
Hid the backpack near the building.
Inconspicuous Crate
Shoved the loot into an inconspicuous little chest - I'll pick it up later.
Spotted a little crate in the bandit base yard while running from them. I should slip back there quietly at night.
Shoved the loot into an inconspicuous crate; I'll pick it up later.
Hidden Backpack
Borov is calling me in for a talk. I feel like my screwup has surfaced. Hid the backpack with the loot under the car. I'll pick it up if everything blows over.
Borov is calling me in for a talk. I feel like my screwup has surfaced. Hid the backpack with the loot under the car. I'll pick it up if everything blows over.
Borov is calling me in for a talk. I feel like my screwup has surfaced. Hid the backpack with the loot under the car. I'll pick it up if everything blows over.
Stash in the Car
Hid the loot in a car right under the bandits' noses; no time to look for anything better.
We pulled good dough out of that Zaporozhets and left only the crate.
Hid the loot in a car right under the bandits' noses. No time to look for anything better!
Stash Under the Cross
Near the scientists' base I set up a stash for myself, a cross with cylinders.
There's a cross on the hill, and a stash under it.
Traded for a good suit from the scientists and hid it under a cross not far from the base. When Khaletsky comes back, we'll rush to the Red Forest.
Old Safe

They say there's a half-buried safe on an island in the swamp. Stalkers supposedly leave loot and gear there when coming from Agroprom and planning to return there, so they don't have to haul it back and forth. If only I could time it right and fleece some sucker.

They say there's a half-buried safe on an island in the swamp. Stalkers supposedly leave loot and gear there when coming from Agroprom and planning to return there, so they don't have to haul it back and forth. If only I could time it right and fleece some sucker.

They say there's a half-buried safe on an island in the swamp. Stalkers supposedly leave loot and gear there when coming from Agroprom and planning to return there, so they don't have to haul it back and forth. If only I could time it right and fleece some sucker.
Pipe with Goods
Stuffed the goods into the pipe near the camp.
Stuffed artifacts into the pipe near the camp. It was horribly hot. At least no one will go near it.
No time to look for a buyer, so I hid it in the pipe.
Backpack Behind the Garages
Serega Volkovich barely made it back from Yantar the other day, half-dead. Snorks. He managed to lose his backpack with loot somewhere behind the garages; good thing we got a fix on it.
Hid a bit of loot behind the garages.
Hid a bit of loot behind the garages.
Backpack with Haul
Hid the backpack in the booth, right behind the iron thing.
Max Gorobets put his gear in the old electrical switch room, getting ready to slip through a window in the radiation onto the factory grounds.
Hid the backpack in the booth, right behind the iron thing.
Stash in the Bus
Put the little crate in the bus... seems hard to spot from the side.
Put the little crate in the bus. Seems hard to spot.
Shmatko barely got out of Yantar last week. Says he spent the whole night in the bus like a mouse, hiding from snorks. In the scare, he forgot all his loot there.
Loot in the Car
Hid a couple of artifacts in the car for Sakharov. As soon as I find the third, I'll bring them to him.
The loot is hidden in a car not far from the grounds. The radiation is not too strong.
The loot is hidden in a car not far from the grounds. The radiation is not too strong.
Old Backpack
Tarasyuk's group disappeared in this sector while trying to slip through a window in the radiation.
They say someone's loot is here, but you cannot get through under the radiation.
They say someone's loot is here, but you cannot get through under the radiation.
Group's Stash
They say some faction has a stash there, near the excavator. How did they get through under the radiation?
Vikta Ptashuk said there is a fat stash hidden there.
They say some faction has a stash here. How did they get through under the radiation?
Tester's Backpack

Another volunteer died; another prototype failed to protect against the radiation. He only made it to the middle of the grounds and stayed there. They say that volunteer was well prepared, but it did not help.

Another volunteer stalker died... another prototype failed to protect against the radiation. He only made it to the middle of the grounds and stayed there. Sakharov wants more accurate measurements, but I'm not going, or I'll end up staying there myself.
Grisha Varava disappeared at Yantar last week. Climbed into the hottest radiation zone, the bastard. All we caught was his SOS.
Old Stash
They say someone's backpack is up high, but there's no way to get there because of the hazards. What hazards? Fear of heights?
They say someone's loot is here, but you cannot get through under the radiation.
They say someone's loot is here, but you cannot get through under the radiation.
Stash in the Hatch
Shcherbak finally worked out the windows in the radiation over Yantar. We'll prepare a little more and move. The gear in the hatch is waiting for its hour.
Shcherbak finally worked out the windows in the radiation over Yantar. We'll prepare a little more and move. The gear in the hatch is waiting for its hour.
Shcherbak finally worked out the windows in the radiation over Yantar. We'll prepare a little more and move. The gear in the hatch is waiting for its hour.
Cache in the Log
Shoved the goods into a log; I think they won't find it.
Shoved the goods into a log - I think they won't find it.
By the GAZ truck, I hid the finds in a log.
Little Crate with Goods
Put repair kits in a crate on the base grounds.
Gritsyuk asked about the debt. I'll need to take it from the little crate and pay him.
Sakharov, the rotten bastard, would not take the artifacts that Chernykh and I dragged out of the forest. We hid them in the crate in the ventilation ducts until we find a dealer.
Safe in the Garage
When Semyon and I went to Tesla, I ducked into the garages for a leak and saw a small safe behind a car in one of them. Need to come back someday and crack it.
We were searching the garages for some guy and ran into a safe in one of them. Need to crack it sometime later.
Syama was calling me to rush to Pripyat. The Seekers filled his head with stories about a "Klondike" there. And if there isn't one? I'll hide part of my gear and what I managed to find today for now.
Satchel in the Attic
We spent two days shooting back at the bastards. By the end, they drove us under the roof, just as our people arrived. I noticed a case there, but in the chaos I forgot it in the attic.

Bloodsuckers drove me into a house not far from the construction site. I noticed a case under the roof there, but forgot it in the attic during the commotion. Still have not gone back to see what's in it.
Hid the artifacts. When I go to Yantar, I'll unload them on Sakharov.
Bundle in the Stump

We were coming back from a raid with the men when I saw some kind of bundle flash in the hollow of a stump. Looked like maybe even a Capsule. I did not draw the others' attention to it then, and afterward I somehow forgot about that stump.
There seemed to be some kind of bundle in the hollow of the stump.
Hid medicine in the stump.
Half-Buried Log
I did not trust those Limansk people. When I came into the city from the Red Forest, I hid the artifacts in a log behind the gazebo.
Before they dropped that bastard, I noticed him fiddling with something by the log behind the gazebo.
Before they dropped that bastard, I noticed him fiddling with something by the log behind the gazebo.
Backpack Under the Dashboard
Threw poor Blockhead's backpack under the dashboard of the old Moskvich.
Threw poor Blockhead's backpack under the dashboard of the old Moskvich. He had food and an artifact in there; should pick it up when I get the chance.
I would not have carried this nasty thing far. Stuffed it into a backpack in a hurry and threw it in the car. Need to come back with a container.
Pipe in the Container
Yava hid a stash in the trash on purpose, then forgot about it himself. Once we handle business, I'll come back and check.
They pinned us in some yard. There, in the pipe by the trash container, there seemed to be something. Once we handle business, I'll come back and check.

They pinned us in some yard. There, in the pipe by the trash container, there seemed to be something. Once we handle business, I'll come back and check. As far as I know, there were 5.45 rounds there.
Backpack Under the Fence
While escaping pursuit, I dropped the backpack under the fence right here.
Since the road to Limansk is closed to me, I'm sending the coordinates of my backpack with loot.
While escaping pursuit, I dropped the backpack under the fence right here.
Pipe in the Sewer
Found some kind of stash in the drain pipe. When we come back, I'll take it.
Rodka dragged some kind of thing from Pripyat. Until we figure out what to do with it, we hid it in the sewer.
Found some kind of stash in the drain pipe. When we come back, I'll take it.
Pipe Under the UAZ
Some sack of junk was sticking out of the pipe under the UAZ. No time to check. If I live, I'll inspect it.
Some sack of junk was sticking out of the pipe under the UAZ. No time to check. If I live, I'll inspect it.
Tyoma leaked a stash to me last week. Said it was a fat one.
Behind the Garages
Vladyan set up a stash for himself in a pipe not far from the construction site.
I saw someone's stash behind the garages, but did not have time to look inside. Check the big pipe behind the tree.
I saw someone's stash behind the garages, but did not have time to look inside. Check the big pipe behind the tree.
Backpack Under the Bridge
A grenade hit the rookie next to me, and the kid cooked right there. Danya tossed his backpack under the bridge. The dead do not care anymore, and it may come in handy for us later.

The new guy flew straight into a Springboard in front of me, and the lad cooked right there. Danya tossed his backpack under the bridge. The dead do not care anymore, and it may come in handy for us later. He had, by the way, a modified SPAS-12 and slugs for it.
Found a deserted spot and carried my supplies to that backpack.
Wounded Man's Things
Mytyay left the Zone and sent me coordinates as a parting gift. Said he hid his backpack there with artifacts. He has no use for it now.
Sanka got scraped up when we were climbing over the wall. Had to leave his backpack behind just to save the man himself.
Sanka got scraped up when we were climbing over the wall. Had to leave his backpack behind just to save the man himself.
Satchel in the Niche
We were passing that yard on a raid and I noticed a little satchel by the fence.
Not far from the stairs with the arch, by the fence, I hid a little crate with repair kits.
We were passing that yard on a raid and I noticed a little satchel by the fence.
Half-Sunk Safe

Kolyan has been running to the ruined bridge a lot lately. Says he is going to relieve himself. Why that far? Some shy type he turned out to be. Looks like he is hiding something from his own people, the greedy bastard. I'll visit there someday; let him gather more first.

Kolyan has been running to the ruined bridge a lot lately. Says he is going to relieve himself. Why that far? Some shy type he turned out to be. Looks like he is hiding something from his own people, the greedy bastard. I'll visit there someday; let him gather more first.

Kolyan has been running to the ruined bridge a lot lately. Says he is going to relieve himself. Why that far? Some shy type he turned out to be. Looks like he is hiding something from his own people, the greedy bastard. I'll visit there someday; let him gather more first.
Grave with a Gas Mask
I trust the dead more than the living. My stash is in the cemetery - the far-left grave, marked with a gas mask.
I trust the dead more than the living. Hid the artifact in the cemetery - the far-left grave, marked with a gas mask.
A deal is worth more than money! You'll find the stash in the cylinders on the unknown grave.
Satchel Under the Stove
Shtirlits stoked the stove for three days. On the fourth, it sank. But Tyapa hides his little satchel in it. Would be nice to see what's inside.
Shtirlits stoked the stove for three days. On the fourth, it sank. But Tyapa hides his little satchel in it. Would be nice to see what's inside.
Shtirlits stoked the stove for three days. On the fourth, it sank. But Tyapa hides his little satchel in it. Would be nice to see what's inside.
Stash Near the Bunker
They say there used to be a bunker there, back when Clear Sky was based in the Swamps. That faction is long gone, but the loot is still lying there.
When Squinty's gang showed up on the path, I sank the stash with loot near the hatch in the water, not far from The Machine Yard.
