When Squinty's gang showed up on the path, I sank the loot near a hatch from some bunker under the Swamps, two steps from the ATP.
Safe with the Reward
Barely tore the door off the safe in the corner - heavy bastard! Dropped off what wasn't for sale. I'll take it on the way back.
My best friend died yesterday. Got himself killed by a beast. I hid his personal things in the bushes as a keepsake. I'll pass them to his wife later.
Keys to the safe. And by my information, there is something valuable inside.
Little Crate Under the Tower

The men from The Machine Yard said Vityunya got his hands on a fine coat somewhere and hid it. And I know one of his stashes under the tower. He used to keep vodka there all the time. I'll check it when I get the chance.

The men from The Machine Yard said Vityunya got his hands on loot somewhere and hid part of it. And I know one of his stashes under the tower. He used to keep vodka there all the time. I'll check it when I get the chance.

The men from The Machine Yard said Vityunya came into some fancy gear somewhere and hid part of it. And I know one of his stashes under the tower. He used to keep vodka there all the time. I'll check it when I get the chance.
Pipe from the Tank
The boys and I are putting everything in the pipe sleeve with the valve, the one running from the tank toward the Swamps. Already scraped together a few trinkets.
The boys and I are putting everything in the pipe sleeve with the valve, the one running from the tank toward the Swamps.
Stashed buckshot and AP rounds for the 47 for a rainy day, in the pipe by the swamp.
Crate in the Kitchen
Set aside the trader's order in the blue crate in the summer kitchen.
Set aside the trader's order in the blue crate in the summer kitchen.
On the southern farmstead, in the summer kitchen, I keep a crate with repair kits. It has saved me more than once.
Stash in the Log
Before heading to another part of the Swamps, I had to unload the backpack. Stuffed part of the loot into a log.
Before heading to another part of the Swamps, I had to unload the backpack. Stuffed part of the loot into a log.
Before heading to another part of the Swamps, I had to unload the backpack. Stuffed part of the loot into a log.
Left Loot
I tossed Vetal's backpack into the reeds, or they would figure out right away that I was the one who killed him.

Stole a backpack with loot right from under some sucker's nose. Did not carry it far, though. To avoid getting burned, I had to dump it nearby in the reeds. Took a quick look - just a couple cheap artifacts inside.
Stole a backpack with loot right from under some sucker's nose. Did not carry it far, though; to avoid getting burned, I had to dump it in the reeds.
Safe in the Reeds
No idea where a safe like that came from in the swamp, but it would have been a sin not to use it. Let everything of mine sit there for now.
Traded so much ammo from the army boys for food that I could not carry it all at once, so I put it in a safe nearby.
No idea where a safe like that came from in the swamp, but it would have been a sin not to use it. Let everything of mine sit there for now.
Stump by the Railroad
We were passing by the railroad when we heard shooting. I quickly hid my things in a stump behind the boulders.

A friend of mine was carrying a pile of goods when he got ambushed in the Swamps. He died, but managed to tell me he hid part of the loot in a rotten stump, not far from the railroad. Need to pick it up.
We were passing by the railroad when we heard shooting. I quickly hid my things in a stump behind the boulders.
Stash in the Electrical Panel
I set up a stash in the transformer booth panel at The Machine Yard. Once I gather more loot, I'll sell it all to the dealers in one go.
Panel of the transformer booth on the farmstead. Any outsider who climbs in gets killed.
Panel of the transformer booth on the farmstead. Any outsider who climbs in gets killed.
Swamp Stump
The senior told me not to take much junk, so I hid mine in a stump near the water pumping station - in the bushes there, under the tree.
Set up a stash under an old stump by the water pumping station. If the next trip goes well, I'll drop something else there.
The guide told me not to take much junk, so I hid mine in a stump near the water pumping station - in the bushes, under the tree.
Lucky's Stash
At the processing plant in the Swamps, there is a very valuable stash in the pipe mouth.
At the processing plant in the Swamps, there is a very valuable stash in the pipe mouth.
Seva Lucky, who jumped out of a Whirligig three times, whispered to me about his old stash in the Swamps.
Snag Under the Boulders
I really liked the sausage the hunters make. Tasty, filling, and almost does not spoil. I took some with me and hid the rest among the rocks so the beasts would not get to it.
I looked for a reliable place for my stash for a long time and found a hollow snag in the reeds under the boulders.
I looked for a reliable place for my stash for a long time and finally found one: among the reeds under the boulders, there is an old hollow snag.
Suitcase

Yesterday we were resting after a run at The Machine Yard when some shady crew showed up soon after. So we left the crate with loot behind the trash container, just to be safe. Who knows what's in their heads. If all goes smooth, we'll quietly pick it up tomorrow.

They say Semyon got himself a top-shelf piece somewhere, but he does not show it in public. I think I know where he keeps it. No wonder he runs to The Machine Yard almost every day, supposedly to chat with the local tramps. Yeah, sure!
Semyon gets anti-rads and other chemicals for free somewhere, plus food and vodka. Someone whispered to me about his stash at The Machine Yard.
Pipe in the Swamp
I got sick of hauling loot through these bogs, so I dropped it on one island in a sunken pipe with a valve. In the reeds, no one will find it without exact coordinates anyway.
Some slick type says he found a route to sell loot directly beyond the Perimeter through the Swamps. We hid a test artifact in the pipe.
I got sick of hauling that loot through these bogs, so I dropped it on one island in a sunken pipe with a valve. In the reeds, no one will find it without exact coordinates anyway.
Backpack in the Swamps
Barely got away from that swamp beast that time and dropped my backpack. I don't want to go back there, but it hurts to lose the loot I gathered.
Barely got away from that swamp beast, but lost the backpack. I don't want to go back there, but maybe I'll have to.
Got a military vest by chance and hid it in the swamps.
Pipe at the Station
Seryoga Dybenko said he knows where the army boys keep a stash at the pumping station.
Lyokha the Proctologist hid an artifact in the pipe mouth by the valve at the old pumping station in the middle of the swamp, before the army boys occupied it. He's still kicking himself.
At the old pumping station in the middle of the swamp, I hid it in the pipe mouth by the valve.
Wooden Cross
In the grave with the only wooden cross in the row at the church cemetery, I set aside a small stash for a rainy day.
The men said that at the church cemetery, under the cross with the gas mask, it is not a dead man buried there at all, but a stash.
In the grave with the only wooden cross in the row at the church cemetery, I set aside a small stash for a rainy day.
Stash in the Reeds

Left a backpack with raid supplies not far from the church, somewhere in the reeds. Now I cannot find it even by the coordinates. Next week I'll send some young blood to search the place properly again.

Left a backpack with raid supplies not far from the church, somewhere in the reeds. Now I cannot find it even by the coordinates. Next week I'll send some young blood to search the place properly again.

Left a backpack with raid supplies not far from the church, somewhere in the reeds. Now I cannot find it even by the coordinates. Next week I'll send some young blood to search the place properly again.
Log by the Tower
Kolka Squinty - may he rest in peace - hid a few things from the last raid in a split tree.
Kolka Squinty - may he rest in peace - hid a few things from the last raid in a split tree.
Kolka Squinty - may he rest in peace - hid a few things from the last raid in a split tree.
Backpack by the Mattress
Lyokha, the blockhead, forgot his backpack where he slept - by the sunken boat next to the mattress.
Saw some fine specimen toss a backpack by the sunken boat before an emission. I'll stop by sometime and see what's there.

Lyokha, the blockhead, forgot his backpack where he slept - by the sunken boat next to the mattress. He was carrying the common food that time; before we reached the point, Lyokha himself nearly got eaten.
Stash Under the Truck Bed
Under the bed of a KAMAZ across from the bridge, someone hid repair kits in a toolbox.
Under the bed of a KAMAZ across from the bridge, in a toolbox.
Found a mechanic's toolbox and hid my treasures there for now. When I get the chance, I'll move them to a proper stash.
Little Crate in the Stove
At the burned farmstead, I made a buckshot stash in the stove. Last time I badly needed it.
A stash like in the Koschei fairy tale: in the casket, the casket in the stove, the stove in the burned house, and the house in the Swamps.
A stash like in the Koschei fairy tale: in the casket, the casket in the stove, the stove in the burned house, and the house in the Swamps.
Stash in the Pipe

During a rest stop, Mitka shoved the backpack into a pipe lying nearby. When we were about to move on, we heard a bloodsucker and a boar tearing into each other somewhere beyond the reeds. We ran, dropping everything while it was busy. Now that bastard has made a lair there, and there is no reaching the backpack.

During a rest stop, Mitka shoved the backpack into a pipe lying nearby. When we were about to move on, we heard a bloodsucker and a boar tearing into each other somewhere beyond the reeds. We ran, dropping everything while it was busy. Now that bastard has made a lair there, and there is no reaching the backpack.

During a rest stop, Mitka shoved the backpack into a pipe lying nearby. When we were about to move on, we heard a bloodsucker and a boar tearing into each other somewhere beyond the reeds. We ran, dropping everything while it was busy. Now that bastard has made a lair there, and there is no reaching the backpack.
Crate in the Pipe
Made a stash with medicine. I'll duck in when things get tight.
Every damn time I don't take a container on a raid, I find an artifact. Hid it in a crate in the pipe.
Got some sniper rounds by chance and put them in the crate in the pipe.
Backpack as Payment
They leaked coordinates for a stash to me. Need to check it. There should be artifacts there, supposedly.
The contents of the backpack - I'm sending its coordinates to your PDA now - will compensate the financial injections into my pocket.
For the deal with Dubitsky - the backpack is in the swamps. Coordinates attached.
Backpack on a Corpse
Ternovsky was supposed to bring a Freedom suit, but he vanished in the Swamps. Only the coordinates remain, from the bearing of his last signal.
Got a lead on a little stash. Backpack by a corpse; they say the lad was hauling ammunition for his group.
Take this lead on a little stash! It is in a backpack, and the backpack is on a corpse's back.
Soldier's Backpack
In the dead army guy's backpack, you'll find goods for your money.

They say some group of scumbags mines corpses in the Zone, so people learn not to touch someone else's loot. I know the coordinates of one interesting dead man like that... whatever is in his backpack...
I hid food in a dead army guy's backpack. Let him "guard" it.
Backpack Under the Pipeline
Coordinates for the backpack lying beside a stalker's corpse under the pipeline.
Here, take the coordinates for the backpack lying beside a stalker's corpse under the pipeline.
I spotted a backpack under the pipeline beside a corpse, but had no time to climb after it.
Dead Fighter
Bandits use corpses like this as loot drop points. They haul loot out of the Zone and bring payment in from beyond the Perimeter.
The information is this: a former young fighter silently guards a backpack in the bushes.
The information is this: a fighter silently guards a backpack with ammunition in the bushes.
On the Dome Ledge
I hid my backpack on the church dome ledge. Jumped around the roof like a mountain goat!

The other day I got drunk to hell; we had ourselves a fine sit-down. Climbed onto the church dome roof to look at the stars and left my backpack with loot there, idiot that I am. Now I'm afraid to climb back up.
I hid my backpack on the church dome ledge.
Satchel in the Cab
Put repair kits in a crate in the crane cab in the reeds.
Found a little satchel in the swamp, packed my belongings into it, and hid it in the crane cab until better times.
Found a little satchel in the swamp, packed my belongings into it, and hid it in the crane cab until better times.
Coded Safe
Last time we went to Demian, I spotted a safe in the Swamps. There was no time to see what was in it then; should go back.
Copied the coordinates of a dead stalker's stash in a safe.
Spotted a safe in the Swamps. There was no time to see what was in it then; should go back and check sometime.
Dead Soldier's Backpack
Spotted a soldier's corpse not far from The Machine Yard. Should inspect his backpack.
The other day, not far from The Machine Yard, dogs tore up a soldier. Once they leave, need to see what he had.
The men said they saw a soldier's corpse not far from The Machine Yard, but could not check what he had because an anomaly was in the way. Need to check after an emission.
Capercaillie's Backpack
Capercaillie bragged too much, showing off that he'd bring back an artifact from the Swamps nobody had ever heard of. That's where he lies now, out in the swamps, with that artifact.
Need to find "Capercaillie" at these coordinates. In the backpack is what Vitka was owed.
You'll find "Capercaillie" at these coordinates. Take what you are owed from his backpack.
Hard-Won Reward
I'll reward you with information about valuable loot that is hard to get. Be careful: its former owner ignored my advice and that was the end of him.
I've got a lead on some guy's backpack. He was carrying something valuable and never delivered it.
They say there's valuable loot here, but hard to get. Supposedly its former owner ignored every piece of advice and got himself killed.
Little Crate by the Tower

Met a drifter. We sat by the fire and drank. He shared a clever recipe: how to cook an artifact out of garbage in an anomaly. Tried it today and it worked. Hid it, and another one I found, under the tower.
A reliable person told me about loot in an ownerless stash hidden under the tower.
A reliable source told me about loot in an ownerless stash hidden under the tower.
Loot as Payment
The loot is in the black backpack under the boulders.
Ran into bandits at night; in the firefight we had to make tracks fast. Dropped the backpack with the cargo between the boulders, behind a bush.
The loot is in the black backpack under the boulders.
Safe Under the Bridge
With army boys, if you want, you can trade anything for vodka. Someone whispered me a stash where they hide pieces.
Stash in the safe under the bridge, not far from The Machine Yard.
Vitka dug up information the day before yesterday about a Clear Sky stash. We're planning to check it.
Among the Boulders
Tossed a bag with things into the crack between three boulders so the boys would not see.
While escaping pursuit, I dropped a backpack with stolen loot between the boulders in the bushes.
Tossed a bag with things into the crack between three boulders so the boys would not see.
Under the Bridge
We sat under the bridge, waiting for the pursuit to run past overhead. I left the backpack with a bit of loot there, fixed to some beam.
We sat under the bridge, waiting for the pursuit to run past overhead. I left the backpack with a bit of loot there, fixed to some beam.
We sat under the bridge, waiting for the pursuit to run past overhead. I left the backpack with a bit of loot there, fixed to some beam.
Backpack Under the Railcar
To run lighter, I left the load under a railcar on the railway track.
In the north of the Swamps, when we crossed the railroad, I spotted a little backpack under a railcar torn apart by an anomaly. It was not convenient to check what was inside.
To run lighter, I left the load under a railcar on the railway track.
Hatch Near the Station
Buried the goods under some hatch near the station so no random thieves would get anything of mine.
Buried the goods under some hatch near the station so no random thieves would get anything of mine.
Threw the find into a hatch near the pumping station.
Backpack on the Island
I was heading to the scientists' base and spotted a stalker's body with an untouched backpack through binoculars. I'll look later; boars have settled there.
That swamp beast chased me for several kilometers, so on some little island I decided to ditch the backpack, or that marathon would have killed me.
That swamp beast chased me for several kilometers, so on some island I decided to ditch the backpack, or that marathon would have killed me.
Snag in the Swamps
We were crossing the Swamps and I noticed a rotten snag by the footbridges. Good place, so I hid my treasure there.
Dropped the piece in a snag by the footbridges. Promised Semyon one like it.
We were crossing the Swamps and I noticed a rotten snag by the footbridges. Good place, so I hid my treasure there.
Middle of the Swamp
In the middle of the swamp, on a concrete thing sticking up with bits of rebar, I left a crate of junk so I could get back to dry land.
In the middle of the swamp, on a concrete piece of shit with bits of rebar, I left a crate of junk so I could get back to dry land.
Some guys from the Warehouses brought me a decent piece, but ammo is tight. Set it aside in a stash for now.
Stash Among the Bushes
I got out of the swamp with no strength left to walk on my own, so I threw the whole load right by the path among the bushes.
I got out of the swamp with no strength left to walk, so I threw the whole load right by the path among the bushes.
Ran out of ammo, dropped the piece in the bushes south of the Southern Farmstead so I could run light to the dealer.
Safe Behind Deadwood
There is a safe behind a dead tree, south of The Fishing Hamlet. Put everything I have in there to avoid temptation... Once there is enough, I'll go trade with Kuznetsov.
Dumped Duty gear in a safe by the barbed wire, near The Fishing Hamlet.
Found this big thing beside a dead soldier and put it in a safe behind The Fishing Hamlet.
Stump by the Sapling
Let fools pay a cut to Hook. I'll keep mine under the stump by the young tree.
Vitek said he left my share in the hollow stump by the young tree.
Let fools pay a cut to Hook. I'll keep mine under the stump by the young tree.
Backpack on the Trail
Why the hell did I drag myself drunk through the Swamps... Lost the backpack with a good suit. Somewhere around here.
Met a Flesh on the path, and all I had for a weapon was a knife. Dropped the backpack there to free my other hand and make running easier. Need to come back sometime.
Met a Flesh on the path, and all I had for a weapon was a knife. Threw the backpack with the coat into the bushes to free my other hand and make running easier. Need to come back sometime.
Junk in the ZAZ
Spent half the night sitting on the roof of a Zaporozhets until our people arrived. I did not know who would reach us first, so I threw my junk somewhere nearby. Need to find it in daylight.
Mikha stuffed the suit he found into the Zaporozhets near the pumping station, the fool. Should have brought it to me.
Spent half the night sitting on the roof of a Zaporozhets until our people arrived. I did not know who would reach us first, so I threw my junk somewhere nearby. Need to find it in daylight.
Safe in the Mud
Kruglov gave me stash coordinates. I'll check in a week or so.
On the bank of the swamp not far from the church, I shoved my find into a safe so thieves would not get it.
On the bank of the swamp not far from the church, I shoved my find into a safe so thieves would not get it.
Church Woodpile
Hid an extra piece and other small odds and ends in the woodpile by the church for now.
Hid an extra piece and other small odds and ends in the woodpile by the church for now.
Hid an extra piece and other small odds and ends in the woodpile by the church for now.
Stump by the Tree
Decided I'll keep the loot in the stump by the dead tree. When I start leaving the Swamps for somewhere else, I'll pick it up.
Decided I'll keep the loot in the stump by the dead tree. When I start clearing out of the Swamps, I'll pick it up.
Found several artifacts. Never saw ones like these on the Cordon. At first glance, very expensive. Hid them in an old stump.
Backpack in the Reeds
The army boys started shooting from the chopper. I bolted through the bushes, and the backpack strap did not hold. There were artifacts in there... took me a week to gather them.
Dropped the backpack in the reeds while fighting off boars. No landmarks at all; good thing I entered the coordinates right away.
Dropped the backpack in the reeds while fighting off boars. No landmarks at all; good thing I entered the coordinates right away.
Crate in the ZIL Cab
Well, I got lucky. Before anyone saw, I decided to hide the goods.
Sanyok the Limper dragged in a mechanic's little crate from somewhere, so we put some valuable bits in it and tossed it into the cab of the rusty ZIL.
Sanyok the Limper dragged in a mechanic's little crate from somewhere, so we put some valuable bits in it and tossed it into the cab of the rusty ZIL.
Crate with Supplies
Lisovets said bandits used to hang around that farmstead all the time. They had to have a stash there. Maybe look around? What if something is still hidden?
Lisovets said bandits used to hang around that farmstead all the time. They had to have a stash there. Maybe look around? What if something is still hidden?
Lisovets said bandits used to hang around that farmstead all the time. They had to have a stash there. Maybe look around? What if something is still hidden?
Backpack in the Swamps
Grisha drunkenly walked into an Electro; he did not even make it back to camp. We put his things in a backpack by the pumping station.
Grisha drunkenly walked into an Electro; he did not even make it back to camp. We put his things in a backpack by the pumping station.
Grisha drunkenly walked into an Electro; he did not even make it back to camp. We put his things in a backpack by the pumping station.
Crate with Loot
Not far from The Machine Yard, among the construction debris, I spotted a little crate for myself. Hid the suit I traded from Semyon in it.
Not far from The Machine Yard, among the construction debris, I spotted a little crate for myself. Hid the suit I traded from Semyon in it.
Not far from The Machine Yard, among the construction debris, I spotted a little crate for myself. Hid the suit I traded from Semyon in it.
Crate
Baragoz came from the North and left a suit and other junk in the stash. Look east of the pumping station, among the boats.
On a raid we learned about a bandit stash, supposedly belonging to Borov's scumbags. When Mityay returns, we'll check it.
Baragoz came from the North and left a suit and other junk in the stash. Look east of the pumping station, among the boats.
Dead Stalker
Zavgorodny Semyon went to Limansk last week, but the men say he never showed up there. The last time we managed to catch his PDA signal was from the point with these coordinates...
Zavgorodny Semyon went to Limansk last week, but the men say he never showed up there. The last time we managed to catch his PDA signal was from the point with these coordinates...
Zavgorodny Semyon went to Limansk last week, but the men say he never showed up there. The last time we managed to catch his PDA signal was from the point with these coordinates...
Dangerous Stash
Already gave one guy information about this stash, but I know for sure that sucker never picked it up - he croaked in an anomaly nearby.
Already gave one guy information about this stash, but I know for sure that sucker never picked it up - he croaked in an anomaly nearby.
Already gave one guy information about this stash, but I know for sure that sucker never picked it up - he croaked in an anomaly nearby.
Safe by the Minecart

From a hill, through binoculars, I saw a bloodsucker tear up a Duty member. When the beast sat down to eat, I dropped it right in the head with a scoped carbine. Hid the dead man's gear by the overturned minecart. No sense letting good things go to waste.
Saw Mitka Ferret fiddling around near the overturned minecart at night. Probably hiding loot from his own people. Tomorrow I should go there alone and search properly.

From a hill, through binoculars, I saw a bloodsucker tear up a Duty member. When the beast sat down to eat, I dropped it right in the head with a scoped carbine. Hid the dead man's armor by the overturned minecart. No sense letting a good thing go to waste.
Plain Old Stump
Mityay and I were coming back from Limansk through the forest and found a capsule. The bastard is hot, and we had no container, just our luck. Hid it in a rotten stump we passed on the way.
Mityay and I were coming back from Limansk through the forest and found a capsule. The bastard is hot, and we had no container, just our luck. Hid it in a rotten stump we passed on the way.
Mityay and I were coming back from Limansk through the forest and found a capsule. The bastard is hot, and we had no container, just our luck. Hid it in a rotten stump we passed on the way.
Poor Guy's Backpack
Found the remains of an unknown stalker. Looks like dogs tore him apart, but the backpack was untouched. Could not carry it all at once, so I put his loot nearby.
Hid a bit of loot in the backpack so gopniks on the road to Limansk would not get on my case. I'll pick it up on the way back.
Hid a bit of loot in the backpack so gopniks on the road to Limansk would not get on my case. I'll pick it up on the way back.
Pipe in the Rubble
Learned about this stash from a captured bandit goon. In short, it is in the rubble behind the APC, in a pipe segment.
Learned about this stash from a captured bandit goon. In short, it is in the rubble behind the APC, in a pipe segment.
Learned about this stash from a captured bandit goon. In short, it is in the rubble behind the APC, in a pipe segment.
Bus
Saw bandits hiding loot stripped from a stalker in the bus. I'll try searching there at night.
Saw bandits hiding loot stripped from a stalker in the bus. I'll try searching there at night.
Saw bandits hiding loot stripped from a stalker in the bus. I'll try searching there at night.
Red Valve
It was stupid to show finds like that in front of the group, so I hid everything in the mine.
It was stupid to show finds like that in front of the group, so I hid everything in the mine.
It was stupid to show finds like that in front of the group, so I hid everything in the mine.
Pipe in the Mine
Left Mikhalyich's share in the old mine. Found a suitable little crate in one of the pipes there.
Mishanya lost his rifle that time, and to avoid hauling the ammo for it, he hid it in a little crate in the pipe. Left a rainy-day stash there too.
Left Mikhalyich's share in the old mine. Found a suitable little crate in one of the pipes there.
Backpack Under the Boulders

We followed the SOS by bearing, but there was no one left to save - dogs had finished the stalker. Hid his backpack under the boulders; there's some strange artifact in it. Need to come back with a container, just in case.
We rested after the raid. I forgot my second backpack among the stones. When I find time, I'll go get it.
We rested after the raid. I forgot my second backpack among the stones. When I find time, I'll go get it.
Stump by the Ravine
Kruglov gave me a lead on a stash, said something valuable should have been left there for them. But on the way I stepped into Witch's Jelly and spent a week on a cot. Should get back to that matter.
Kruglov gave me a lead on a stash, said something valuable should have been left there for them. But on the way I stepped into Witch's Jelly and spent a week on a cot. Should get back to that matter.
Kruglov gave me a lead on a stash, said something valuable should have been left there for them. But on the way I stepped into Witch's Jelly and spent a week on a cot. Should get back to that matter.
Big Stump
Seva said there is a big hollow stump in the Red Forest. I'll try to find it from his lead.
Seva said there is a big hollow stump in the Red Forest. I'll try to find it from his lead.
Seva said there is a big hollow stump in the Red Forest. I'll try to find it from his lead.
Stash in the Adit
A stash where diggers once kept their goods.
A stash where diggers once kept their goods.
In the abandoned adit, at the very end, I hid the loot.
Zaporozhets by the Mine
Near the descent into the mines, I put my finds under the seat of the Zaporozhets. I'll pick them up on the way back to Sakharov.
Near the descent into the mines, I put my finds and a few repair kits under the seat of the Zaporozhets. I'll pick them up on the way back to Sakharov.
Left the weapon in the Zaporozhets by the old mine. In a couple days we'll go after the giant with it.
Stump by the Ravine
Not far from a huge anomaly, we quietly hid some junk in a stump. Now we're going to check that thing up close ourselves; near something that big there have to be valuable artifacts.
Not far from a huge anomaly, we quietly hid some junk in a stump. Now we're going to check that thing up close ourselves; near something that big there have to be valuable artifacts.
Finally found my first Capsule. Hid it from my partner in a stump by the ravine.
Holey Stump
Heard some squealing and howling behind me. Bolted through the forest and shoved my things into a hollow stump.
Heard some squealing and howling behind me. Bolted through the forest and shoved the loot I found into a hollow stump.
Heard some squealing and howling behind me. Bolted through the forest and shoved the loot I found into a hollow stump.
Backpack in the Bushes
An emission was starting, and we rushed through the bushes to shelter. I dropped my backpack with artifacts in them. Crawled through everything afterward and never found it.
An emission was starting, and we rushed through the bushes to shelter. I dropped my backpack with loot in them. Crawled through everything afterward and never found it.
An emission was starting, and we rushed through the bushes to shelter. I dropped my backpack with loot in them. Crawled through everything afterward and never found it.
Pipe in the Cart

I had a lucky walk through the forest today. Too bad I did not take a container with better protection. I'll hide the capsule in the rusty minecart for now. There's a pipe of just the right size lying in it.
Hid the advance payment to the huntsman for the chimeras in the pipe in the minecart.

I had a lucky walk through the forest today. Too bad I did not take a container with better protection. I'll hide the capsule in the rusty minecart for now. There's a pipe of just the right size lying in it.
Boulder by the Ravine
Dogs pinned me by the ravine. Dropped the backpack behind the boulders and made a break for it.

We received an urgent briefing to check reports of a large mutant pack in our sector. Ivantsov ordered us to drop everything extra so we would not lose time. I hid the backpack with artifacts behind the boulders.
Dogs pinned me by the ravine. Dropped the backpack behind the boulders and made a break for it.
Lost Property
Abrasha, the idiot, lost my backpack among the stones, somewhere around this point. And he is too scared to go back for it, the bastard.
Abrasha, the idiot, lost my backpack among the stones, somewhere around this point. And he is too scared to go back for it, the bastard.
Abrasha, the idiot, lost my backpack among the stones, somewhere around this point. And he is too scared to go back for it, the bastard.
Stash in the Stump
Zhmenya is a bastard. Said there was a decent artifact lying here, but it turned out to be a capsule. How am I supposed to carry it without a container?!
Zheka and I tucked some odds and ends into a stump in the Red Forest.
Zheka and I tucked some odds and ends into a stump in the Red Forest.
Stump Before the Forest
Who knows what waits for us in this forest. Better to go in without overload. I'll leave part of the gear in this noticeable rotten stump.
Who knows what waits for us in this forest. Better to go in without overload. I'll leave part of the gear in this noticeable rotten stump.
Lyokha Rakovsky and his group dragged excellent loot from Limansk last week. Hid the Weathered One's share not far from the old mine. When he recovers, he'll pick it up.
Stump in the Deep Woods
Got lost in the Red Forest and dumped all my junk into the hollow of a stump at this point.
Got lost in the Red Forest and dumped all my junk into the hollow of a stump at this point.
Pavlik is lucky. We had barely entered the forest when a capsule rolled right under his feet. Shame we had no spare container. Had to hide it in the nearest stump.
Backpack Under the Collapse
At the exit from the Red Forest, boulders broke loose from the hill and nearly crushed me! Then something dark lunged at me from the top. I ran from there so hard I lost my backpack somewhere.
At the exit from the Red Forest, boulders broke loose from the hill and nearly crushed me! Then something dark lunged at me from the top. I ran from there so hard I lost my backpack somewhere.
At the exit from the Red Forest, boulders broke loose from the hill and nearly crushed me! Then something dark lunged at me from the top. I ran from there so hard I lost my backpack somewhere.
Things in the Hollow Tree
On the road to Limansk, we hid a spare armored vest in the hollow of a fallen tree at the exit from the reserve.
On the road to Limansk, we hid our things in the hollow of a fallen tree at the exit from the reserve.
Serega Popovich left the reserve three days ago for the bridge to Limansk, and the local boys met him there. Good thing he hid the loot in a log.
Blue Crate
Shashkevich found out about the huntsman's crate where he keeps his loot. Promised to share.
Shashkevich found out about the huntsman's crate where he keeps his loot. Promised to share.
Shashkevich found out about the huntsman's crate where he keeps his loot. Promised to share.
Strange Place

Fell asleep at night under a boulder on my backpack, and in the morning woke up somewhere completely different. Tried to figure it out, to find that stone, but soon realized I was just walking circles around some clearing. Damn weirdness. Decided to forget it.

Fell asleep at night under a boulder on my backpack, and in the morning woke up somewhere completely different. Tried to figure it out, to find that stone, but soon realized I was just walking circles around some clearing. Damn weirdness. Decided to forget it.

Fell asleep at night under a boulder on my backpack, and in the morning woke up somewhere completely different. Tried to figure it out, to find that stone, but soon realized I was just walking circles around some clearing. Damn weirdness. Decided to forget it.
Cursed Loot

At a rest stop they told a story about a backpack with loot in the forest. Its owner is the Black Stalker himself. That loot is cursed. At first I thought I'd go look for it, then decided to hell with it. What if it's true?

At a rest stop they told a story about a backpack with loot in the forest. Its owner is the Black Stalker himself. That loot is cursed. At first I thought I'd go look for it, then decided to hell with it. What if it's true?

At a rest stop they told a story about a backpack with loot in the forest. Its owner is the Black Stalker himself. That loot is cursed. At first I thought I'd go look for it, then decided to hell with it. What if it's true?
Backpack in the Forest

Like I walked through a horror show. I don't know how I got out of that cursed forest. Lost my backpack. In theory, there is only one place I could have "sown" it. Need to go look when I come to my senses.

Like I walked through a horror show. I don't know how I got out of that cursed forest. Lost my backpack. In theory, there is only one place I could have "sown" it. Need to go look when I come to my senses.
Prokhorenko blurted out drunk that a former Freedom member got him some nice armor. Copied some coordinates from his PDA. Should take a look.
Backpack Under the Boulders

I was dropping from exhaustion and fell asleep under the boulders. Woke up, and some beast was sleeping next to me, chewing my bag in its sleep. I bolted out of there like a running champion! No time for the backpack then.

I was dropping from exhaustion and fell asleep under the boulders. Woke up, and some beast was sleeping next to me, chewing my bag in its sleep. I bolted out of there like a running champion! No time for the backpack then.

I was dropping from exhaustion and fell asleep under the boulders. Woke up, and some beast was sleeping next to me, chewing my bag in its sleep. I bolted out of there like a running champion! No time for the backpack then.
Tree by the Fence
A bloodsucker chased me all the way to the reserve fence, the bastard! Drove me up a tree. If I had not left the backpack there, no damn way I would have jumped to the fence.
A bloodsucker chased me all the way to the reserve fence, the bastard! Drove me up a tree. If I had not left the backpack there, no damn way I would have jumped to the fence.

Black Backpack

Sashka Spivak's group, last time they were in the forest, picked up a beacon signal not far from the old mine. They did not check it; an emission was about to start and they were hurrying to base. When we're nearby, we need to take a look.

Backpack on a Branch
Hid from some beast in a tree. Did not see the monster itself, only heard it in the fog. Left the backpack on a branch, jumped down, and ran from there! Need to come back for it later.
Hid from some beast in a tree. Did not see the monster itself, only heard it in the fog. Left the backpack on a branch, jumped down, and ran from there! Need to come back for it later.

Backpack in the Forest
Threw a backpack with supplies into the bed of a vehicle in the tunnel before Limansk.
Threw a backpack with supplies into the bed of a vehicle in the tunnel before Limansk.

Barricades in the Corridor
Made a supply stash for my group in a safe on the second floor of the sanatorium. Left rounds, grenades, and some medicine.
Made a supply stash for my group in a safe on the second floor of the sanatorium. Left canned food, vodka, and hunting sausage.
Hid the loot in an old safe at Sunray. In the barricades down the corridor on the second floor.
Backpack Under the Stairs
I was hauling a lot of loot from the Gut to the Cordon. Dropped part of it in the sanatorium.

Threw a backpack with finds onto the transformer booth.
Need to search the area properly. Put the supplies and the artifact I found in the backpack for now. Hope I don't forget.

Whoa! Found a capsule here and a simpler artifact. I'll hide them on the tank for now and sell them to Mikhalyich tomorrow. We're just about to head to Limansk.

Nomad boasted that they could not even carry everything out from the last raid to Tesla; they hid a backpack with artifacts in the stove. I copied the coordinates from him.

Little Crate
Put the artifacts I found in the crate. I'll pick them up when I head back.

unused
unused
Backpack in the Tower
Had a good run. Let the find sit here for now.
Traded for it from the hunters and hid it for now.
Supplies for the den.
Tool Crate
I kept my tools in a crate in the attic of the old regional committee dacha. Of course zombies had to show up there.
Vitka Shaly hid his coat in the attic of a dacha in the Gut. The men said that coat brought luck. Crazy should not have parted with it.
Semyon went to the regional committee dacha. Wanted to make himself a stash. Never came back.
Backpack in the Shed
Stuffed the loot into the woodpile.
The Duty member got unlucky. We put his gear in the firewood.
The Duty member got unlucky. We put his gear in the firewood.
Backpack in the Bus
Miscalculated the weight and had to dump the excess in the bus for now.
Young pseudodogs tore up Yashka. We hid his backpack with junk in the bus.
We finished someone here. Everything unnecessary he had on him, we hid in the bus on the road.
Military Crate
Looks like someone stole a crate of rounds from the army boys. They put it under a fir tree in the Gut.
Shorty boasted that he saw a carbine under the fir tree. Right in the crate, brand new.
Put my hardware together with the artifacts I found in a crate under the fir tree. No one will covet it.
Under the Boulder in the Tunnel
Wrapped the shotgun in a coat and hid it in the tunnel.
Wrapped the artifacts in a coat so they would not glow at night. Need to carry them to the Bar or to Raven.
Put an old rifle in the crate under the fir tree. It will be a spare.
Military Backpack
unused
unused
unused
Backpack
Threw a backpack with gear onto the boulder beside the car wreck. I'll pick it up on the way back.
Gathered it for Raven, including one curious specimen. By the stripped URAL.
Serega, a Duty man, promised to get me a decent little suit and gave me coordinates for a backpack.
Backpack
Burers drove me into the tunnel by the bridge, so I had to hide the backpack and run light.
Semyonov promised to get Feeble a piece and sent stash coordinates the other day.
Took the suit under the bridge. It is safe there.
Backpack
Traded for extra from Kuznetsov and hid the backpack behind a fallen tree, not far from the fire truck.
Put the spare suit in a backpack and shoved it under the boulders behind the fallen tree.
Seems to me not many drinkers come through here. Dead place.
Crate in the UAZ

Ruslan Didenko blurted out by the fire yesterday that when they were coming from the Dark Valley, they noticed all kinds of useful hardware in the trunk of a UAZ. There was a whole Kalash there too, with repair kits for it. They did not take anything because they were already loaded down.
Dropped the extra load in a crate in the UAZ.
Found a Kalash near the army convoy, perfectly intact, with ammo for it. Decided to leave it here. It'll be my spare piece, just in case.
Crate Under the Bus
The broken container does not protect worth a damn from radiation, so I tossed it under the bus. Need to come back with a proper one and pick it up.
Vergas said there is a lot of abandoned machinery in the Gut; stalkers bring him parts from there. He sent me the coordinates.
On the way back from Raven, those burer bastards pinned me by the bus, so I threw the crate under the cab.
Signalmen's Crate
The men said there's a nasty spot in the Gut under the railway bridge. The military convoy did not stop there for nothing. That's where we need to search.
The men said there's a nasty spot in the Gut under the railway bridge. The military convoy did not stop there for nothing. That's where we need to search.
The men said there's a nasty spot in the Gut under the railway bridge. The military convoy did not stop there for nothing. That's where we need to search.
Pipe
The hunter patrol sitting by the high-voltage tower hides loot in the pipe under the slab.
Stuffed the artifact into the pipe under the slab so the men would not see. Later I'll go to Sidorovich and trade it for proper food.
Saw the hunters hiding something in the pipe under the slab, near the high-voltage tower.
Scientists' Crate
unused
unused
unused
Green Crate
There is a decent stock of provisions in the switchman's house.
There is a whole crate of hunting ammunition in the railway workers' house.
Hid dry rations and vodka in the station keeper's house. Might come in handy.
Backpack in the Stove
Fleshes drove me into the house, so I had to dump the extra weight and leave light.
Put hides and an artifact here for a future coat. One more and I'll sew one for myself.
Timokha got killed in a clash with the army boys. We buried him not far from the switchman's house. I shoved the piece into the stove.
Backpack in the Shed
Max went to Foggy Thicket and asked me to hide his backpack for a while. Let it sit here for now; quiet place.
Hid vodka and matches in the shed at the farmstead. Irreplaceable stuff on a night raid.
In the shed, I put a gun, buckshot, and a couple grenades. Nimble always wanted one like this.
Backpack in the Outhouse
Timokha dropped his backpack into the outhouse at the farmstead. Too squeamish to fish it out.
Timokha dropped his backpack into the outhouse at the farmstead. Too squeamish to fish it out.
Timokha dropped his backpack into the outhouse at the farmstead. Too squeamish to fish it out.
Backpack in the Stove
Got a decent piece, but still have not found ammo. Hid it in the stove.
Put the vodka in the stove. Place seems deserted.
Traded for plenty of buckshot from the hunters. Hid it in the stove in the ruined house.
Rusty Crate
Got myself a crate for repairs. It is good to get by on the farmstead between raids: quiet, calm, not a soul around.
For now, I dumped unnecessary ammunition in a crate at the farmstead. I visit it now and then.
Dug up a rarity from some drifters and put it in the crate in the attic for now.
Crate in the Attic
Rounds, food, medicine, other small stuff - put it all in the crate in the attic. I'm not hauling that much on my back. It'll be a stash for the next run.

Vitka Toshchy argued with Sidorovich, so Sidorovich spread word about him to every dealer. If not for this crate, Toshchy would have quit already. This way everyone's happy: he puts the artifacts he finds into the crate, and I put in gear and money earned from Sidorovich.
Zhora said he hid a decent rifle in the attic of the house by the little swamp. I have not checked.
Torn Merc Suit
There was no time to think: wrapped the loot in the suit and hid it here.
We were coming back from the Swamps loaded down, so I wrapped the excess in a jacket and tossed it behind the shed.
Rostik disappeared in the Swamps. Everything left is hidden behind the shed in the jacket.
Stalker Supplies
The locals keep food and drink there.
Stalkers keep a small ammunition reserve in the house.
Denya swore that stalkers keep all the artifacts they find in that crate. Still young, so he believes anything people blurt out.
Stash in a Suit
Wrapped a piece in an old armored vest and hid it in the shed. Joker will sell it to the rookies later.
A few packs of slugs and canister shot are hidden in the shed, wrapped in a suit.
Wrapped the artifacts in an old suit, in the shed. Rostik promised to tell me where I can sell them for a better price.
Tool Crate
Hid rounds for the 47 in the cab of the URAL at the farmstead.
Bogdan passed through the farmstead and saw a little tool crate in the torn-off cab.
Zyama saw two outsiders circling around the torn-off URAL cab at the farmstead. Should check it.
Under the Trough
Wanted to pick up an artifact, but dogs came running. Only had time to shove it under the trough on the farm. I'll stop by later and pick it up.
A stash. They won't look in the manure under the trough.
Put canned food and other food at the old farm, under the trough.
Little Crate on the Wall
Foolishly left the crate at the farmstead in plain sight. Probably already stolen.
Raspy keeps collecting all kinds of junk that we take off people. Says he'll be fabulously rich soon. Just in case, I noted where he carries it all.
Put all kinds of junk in a crate so I would not have to carry it, then threw it up onto the wall. People usually do not look up high.
Crate in the Attic
Roma Korobov brought in some crazy thing the other day! Won't say where from. We hid it in the attic for now.
The boys stole a crate of grenades from the army guys at night and split them between stashes.
At the farmstead I came across a soldier's corpse; he had stepped into Witch's Jelly. Hid his "big gun" in the attic.
Crate in the Store
Someone foolishly left a suit in plain sight. Took it to the store; should offer it to the rookies in the village.
Rusty piece, no one will buy it now. Dropped it in a crate in the "Groceries" store.
Took a crate with supplies to the store beyond the radioactive little swamp. They'll be afraid to climb in there.
Backpack in the Attic

This place is strange and very dangerous. Somehow I managed to reach the attic and put all the loot there; otherwise I would not have gotten away. Now I don't even know how to get those artifacts out.

This place is strange and very dangerous. Somehow I managed to reach the attic and put all the loot there; otherwise I would not have gotten away. Now I don't even know how to get those artifacts out.

This place is strange and very dangerous. Somehow I managed to reach the attic and put all the loot there; otherwise I would not have gotten away. Now I don't even know how to get those artifacts out.
Secret Under the Bridge

There were a lot of rumors about this little backpack. Supposedly something was left here by a well-armed group of mercenaries. But no one ever had the guts to check. No matter, I'll get there first for sure.

There were a lot of rumors about this little backpack. Supposedly something was left here by a well-armed group of mercenaries. But no one ever had the guts to check. No matter, I'll get there first for sure.

There were a lot of rumors about this little backpack. Supposedly something was left here by a well-armed group of mercenaries. But no one ever had the guts to check. No matter, I'll get there first for sure.
Scientists' Supplies
We reached the required location. The guide died a couple hours ago. We'll leave all the heavy things here for now. We need to go back.
It seems we have chosen a decent place for temporary storage. We'll leave medical supplies and food here.
I'm the only one left... The whole group was wiped out by some unusual chimera, and by a miracle I survived. I'm dumping everything extra in this backpack and getting out of here.
Pipe in the Pit
The run turned out very productive; I cannot carry everything. I'll leave it here for now and pick it up later.
Yesterday I bought a lead from Raspy. Somewhere around here there should be something very valuable.
Hid valuable artifacts in the pipe. Let them lie until better times.
Crate in the Reeds
Hid all the artifacts gathered recently here. No one will find them here.
Hid all the artifacts gathered recently here. No one will find them here.
Hid all the artifacts gathered recently here. No one will find them here.
Bandit Common Fund
Bandits are hiding something under the pipe; need to pay a visit. From the conversation, sounds like food supplies.
Bandits are hiding something under the pipe; need to pay a visit. From the conversation, sounds like some of their supplies.
Raspy and I put the artifacts we squeezed out of suckers into the common fund. Time to get a container.
Backpack in the Nook
The batteries in the flashlight are dying. Need to get out of here, so I hid the backpack with extra gear behind chunks of concrete and will go light. Better hungry than dead.
Came across someone's loot in the underground. The whole stash is covered in webs, clearly not needed anymore. I'll stop by on the way back.
Hid the backpack behind chunks of concrete and will go light. Better hungry than dead.
Bloodsucker's Crate
The crate is behind the rusty barrel in the underground, everything is there. I am not going back there, no way! I still don't understand how I managed to take down that bloodsucker.
Crate with armor, behind the rusty barrel in the underground. I still don't remember by what miracle I killed that bloodsucker.
Found an army guy in Witch's Jelly; some things survived. Put them here.
Stalker's Loot
They stitched up a curious stalker. The loot he dragged in was put there.
Gritsyuk said stalkers hide their loot there.
The loot is behind the wall. I stand by my word!
Mole's Burrow
Dug up a few valuables. Clever little spot, on the yellow barrel. Put them there until better times.
Spotted a little bag with loot on the tank. Did not have time to look; the army boys sent a patrol into the underground.
Dug up a few valuables here and picked a nice place for a stash. On the yellow barrel; an outsider can go to hell, he'll never find it!
Little Crate in the Attic
Came to visit Swamp Doctor and patch myself up. Put the capsule here; I don't feel like carrying it.
They say Swamp Doctor keeps his medical supplies here.
A crate in the attic of a little house in the middle of the damned thicket... What could be in there?
Loot in the Electrical Panel
Rumors say there was a stalker who got into this laboratory and hid his loot in the electrical panel in the elevator shaft. But he never managed to take it back.
Rumors say there was a stalker who got into this laboratory and hid his loot in the electrical panel in the elevator shaft. But he never managed to take it back.
I copied from Sakharov the coordinates of a beacon sending a signal from the laboratory. It could very well be someone's stash.
Scout's Backpack
Rumor has it a stalker broke into this lab, but died in the area where they kept the test subjects. His stuff is still there.
Rumor has it there was a stalker who broke into this laboratory, and he kicked the bucket near the cages with the test subjects, with all his loot on him.
Rumor has it there was a stalker who broke into this laboratory, and he kicked the bucket near the cages with the test subjects, with all his loot on him.
Smokey's Stash

In the underground laboratory, Smokey put everything in a safe. Not a bad place: no one has keys to that laboratory. The one problem is that stones suddenly start flying through the air on their own - they even said someone got killed.
Copied the coordinates of an underground stash from a drunk stalker. Bound to be a tasty little prize.

Smokey, the idiot, took all our artifacts to the underground laboratory and put them in a safe there. Great choice... Stones fly through the air there for no reason. How are we supposed to get them out now?
Abandoned Backpack
Had to leave the backpack with things in the lab.
Had to leave the big gun inside and get out in a hurry.
Had to leave the backpack in the underground laboratory.
